If the offense throws to the sideline, the cloud (flat) defenders are sitting on the out and the smash.
If they attack the middle, the underneath hook zones squeeze the crossers.
Deep balls are capped three-deep, so force the underneath throw.
usage_notes: Beats: flat routes, smash, and quick outs to the sideline. Coach's Key: three-deep with cloud (flat) defenders driving the sidelines.

name: shinobi_cover_1_lb_blitz

routes.note: Red arrow attacks downhill
Red arrow attacks downhill
Red arrow attacks downhill
White dot fires a red arrow through the gap
Second white dot fires a red arrow through the gap
Blue line drops to the deep middle zone (single high)

reads: IF the offense shows a quick pass, THEN trust the deep safety and let the rush get home.
IF a back stays in to block, THEN the extra blitzer should still find a free lane.
IF the QB escapes the pocket, THEN keep the single-high safety over the top.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing pass plays. Coach's Key: five rushers with one deep safety, win before the routes break.

name: shinobi_nickel_sim_3

routes.note: Cluster of red arrows pressures the middle and edge
Yellow lines drop into the tan underneath zones
Purple lines spill to the purple flat zones
Blue lines bail to the deep blue zones behind three high

reads: IF the line slides protection, THEN the simulated extra rusher should find the soft gap.
IF the ball comes out hot, THEN the underneath hook defenders rally to the catch.
IF nothing opens underneath, THEN the deep zones stay disciplined over the top.
usage_notes: Beats: aggressive quick game. Coach's Key: it looks like pressure but it drops into zone behind a simulated rush.

name: shinobi_cover_4_quarters

routes.note: Three down linemen drop red arrows straight ahead
Four blue lines split the field into deep fourths
Pink and yellow lines settle in the underneath zones

reads: IF a receiver runs deep, THEN the nearest quarter defender carries him vertically.
IF the route stays short, THEN pass it off and squeeze the underneath window.
IF the run shows, THEN the safeties trigger downhill from depth.
usage_notes: Beats: deep shots and four verticals. Coach's Key: four over the top, keep everything in front and tackle.

name: shinobi_cover_3_buzz_mable

routes.note: Three down linemen send red arrows straight ahead
Blue lines bail to three deep zones
Yellow line buzzes down into the middle hook (tan zone)
Purple lines drop to the curl-flat windows

reads: IF a seam route shows, THEN the buzz defender walls the middle hook.
IF the ball goes to the flat, THEN the curl-flat defender drives on it.
IF a vertical breaks deep, THEN the three deep zones stay on top.
usage_notes: Beats: crossers and middle-of-field routes. Coach's Key: a safety buzzes the hook so the middle is not naked.

name: shinobi_edge_blitz_0

routes.note: Red arrow off the edge
Red arrow up the middle
Red arrow off the edge
White dot fires a red arrow inside
Outside white dot fires a red arrow off the edge

reads: IF the back releases, THEN there is no deep help, get home fast.
IF the QB climbs the pocket, THEN the inside rushers must converge.
IF a quick throw beats it, THEN that is the cost of an all-out edge pressure.
usage_notes: Beats: empty and slow protections. Coach's Key: zero coverage edge pressure, the rush has to win now.

name: shinobi_cover_9

routes.note: Three down linemen send red arrows straight ahead
Blue lines drop to the deep blue zones
Cyan, yellow and pink lines fill the underneath cyan/tan/purple zones

reads: IF a receiver pushes vertical, THEN the deep zones carry him.
IF the throw is underneath, THEN the matched underneath defender drives and tackles.
IF the pattern floods one side, THEN pass routes off cleanly between zones.
usage_notes: Beats: route combinations that flood a zone. Coach's Key: pattern-match underneath with deep help layered behind.

name: shinobi_gaps_a_b_blitz

routes.note: Seven red squares on the line, every one with a red arrow firing straight ahead into the A and B gaps. This is a maxed-out interior pressure look.
The two rushers flanking the center fire into the A gaps on either side of the ball.
The rushers outside them attack the B gaps between guard and tackle.
Three white dots sit just behind the line with two white X wider and deeper. No drawn drops, they are holding short to cover the goal line.

reads: IF the back tries to bang it up the middle, THEN one of the seven gap rushers should already be in his face.
IF the line slides one way, THEN the unblocked gap rusher on the backside is your free hitter.
IF the QB pulls it to throw, THEN get hands up and collapse the pocket fast, there is no deep help.
usage_notes: Beats: inside power and dive runs at the goal line. Coach's Key: every gap is accounted for up front, so win your one-on-one and meet the ball in the backfield.

name: shinobi_gaps_b_blitz

routes.note: Seven red squares on the line, red arrows angling inward off the snap rather than straight down. The pressure funnels toward the interior B gaps.
The arrows tilt in toward the guard area, pinching the B gaps shut between guard and tackle.
Outermost red squares angle their arrows in as well, squeezing the run lanes from the outside in.
White dots and X sit behind the line covering the back of the end zone. No drawn drops.

reads: IF the ball goes interior, THEN the pinching B gap rushers should swallow it.
IF the back bounces it outside off the pinch, THEN the crashing edge has to redirect and chase.
IF it is a pass, THEN the angled rush still collapses the middle, get arms up.
usage_notes: Beats: guard-area runs and inside zone. Coach's Key: the rush angles in to wall off the B gaps, so trust the pinch and do not over-pursue.

name: shinobi_60_out_jacks

routes.note: Six red arrows fire forward off the line, the two interior linemen cross their paths (the Jacks twist) to scramble the protection
White dot behind the line, no deep drop drawn, sits in the box
Second white dot behind the line, stays in the box
Cyan line runs from the left end mark out to the wide oval on that side
Cyan line runs from the right end mark out to the wide oval on that side

reads: If the ball snaps inside, the six-man rush with the interior twist should close every gap fast.
If they try a quick out or fade to the perimeter, the two wide players carry it to the sideline.
If the back leaks late, the two box linebackers fill the short hole.
usage_notes: Beats: tight goal-line runs and quick inside passes. Coach's Key: the Jacks twist on the interior linemen is the wrinkle, everything else is straight 6-2 pressure.

name: shinobi_goal_line_blitz

routes.note: Six red arrows fire straight downhill off the line of scrimmage
White dot adds into the rush, red arrow continues straight ahead
Second white dot adds into the rush straight ahead
End mark also fires forward, giving an eight-plus body straight push

reads: If they snap and hand off inside, every gap is filled because the whole front is coming straight ahead.
If the quarterback holds it, the all-out rush should get home before any route develops.
If they motion or shift, stay home and keep rushing the assigned gap, there is no coverage help drawn behind this.
usage_notes: Beats: short-yardage quarterback sneaks and dive plays. Coach's Key: this is a max all-out push with nobody dropping, do not call it if they can hit a quick fade.

name: shinobi_cover_4_quarters-2

routes.note: Four red arrows off the line, base four-man rush
Four blue deep dropper zones spread across the field, each defender takes a deep quarter
Purple underneath droppers carry the intermediate window
Cyan line shows a defender sliding across to match alignment

reads: IF the offense pushes two verticals to a side, THEN the two near quarter defenders cap them over the top.
IF a back releases to the flat, THEN the underneath purple dropper jumps it while the deep four stay home.
IF nothing crosses the deep line, THEN keep all four over the top and rally up on the catch.
usage_notes: Beats: four verticals and deep shots. Coach's Key: four over the top, gives up the underneath.

name: shinobi_cover_3_match

routes.note: Four red arrows at the line, base four-man rush
Blue deep zones with white coverage lines matching receivers down the field
Purple underneath droppers pattern-match the intermediate routes

reads: IF a receiver runs vertical, THEN the deep defender matches and carries him.
IF the route stops short, THEN pass him off and squeeze the next threat in the zone.
IF a back swings out, THEN the underneath dropper triggers on the flat.
usage_notes: Beats: vertical concepts and four verts by matching man-style downfield. Coach's Key: three deep, pattern matched underneath.

name: shinobi_cover_1_ss_blitz

routes.note: Four red arrows off the line
Fifth red arrow from the edge defender, brings the pressure
Single blue deep zone over the top
Blue line shows the SS triggering down toward the line

reads: IF the line picks up the front four, THEN the fifth rusher comes free off the edge.
IF the back stays in to block, THEN the blitz gets soaked up, work the man coverage underneath.
IF the ball comes out hot, THEN the deep free safety stays on top of the lone deep route.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing dropbacks. Coach's Key: five-man pressure with one high safety, win up front fast.

name: shinobi_cover_3_cloud

routes.note: red arrow, left end rushes
red arrow
red arrow
red arrow, right end rushes
purple zone, jumps the left flat
white hook zone over the middle
white curl zone to the right
blue deep third
blue deep third, left
blue deep, cyan zone right side

reads: IF you get four-man pressure home, THEN the back seven sit in their spots and rally to the catch.
IF the offense floods one flat, THEN the cloud corner squeezes the underneath route while the deep third stays on top.
IF a receiver runs vertical, THEN pass him off from the curl to the deep third defender.
usage_notes: Beats: short flats and curls into the cloud side. Coach's Key: cloud corner is your trap defender, deep thirds never bite up.

name: shinobi_lb_dogs

routes.note: red arrow
red arrow
red arrow
red arrow
red arrow, linebacker fires downhill
red arrow, linebacker fires downhill

reads: IF the line and both dogging backers come, THEN you are bringing pressure off the front and trusting man behind.
IF the back stays in to block, THEN one linebacker gets a free runner at the quarterback.
IF the ball comes out hot, THEN your coverage defenders have to be tight in man right away.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing pass plays and quarterbacks who hold the ball. Coach's Key: this is a max-pressure call, the dogging linebackers must time the snap.

name: shinobi_cover_6

routes.note: red arrow
red arrow
red arrow
red arrow
purple zone, quarter coverage left
blue deep, cover-2 side
yellow/white match carry
yellow zone to the cover-2 flat
blue deep, quarter side

reads: IF the formation declares strength, THEN play quarters to one side and cover-2 to the other.
IF a receiver runs vertical on the quarter side, THEN the corner and safety bracket him.
IF the route stays underneath on the cover-2 side, THEN sink the corner to the flat and let the safety cap the half.
usage_notes: Beats: deep shots when you guess the right split. Coach's Key: it is quarter-quarter-half, set the cover-2 half to the passing strength.

name: shinobi_cover_3_buzz

routes.note: four white box markers on the line with red arrows driving upfield
center blue deep zone, defender drops to the middle third
left blue deep zone with drop line shown
right blue deep zone with drop line shown
white line shows a deeper defender buzzing down into the middle hook area
left purple underneath zone
right purple underneath zone
two olive/tan underneath hook zones

reads: IF the offense pushes a vertical down the seam, THEN the buzz defender carries it until the deep zones take over.
IF the ball goes to a flat or curl, THEN the purple underneath defenders rally and squeeze.
IF a back leaks out, THEN a hook defender passes him to the curl-flat player.
usage_notes: Beats: vertical and seam concepts with three deep zones. Coach's Key: the buzz dropper plugs the middle hook so it plays like a 4-deep, sound 3-deep shell.

name: shinobi_tampa_2

routes.note: Cyan flat/deep zone drop bracketing the left sideline
Cyan flat/deep zone drop bracketing the right sideline
Green vertical drop carrying the middle, the Tampa 2 hole runner
Drops to a short white underneath zone
Drops to a short white underneath zone
One of the two deep blue zones over the top
One of the two deep blue zones over the top
Four red rush arrows off the front, no extra blitzer

reads: IF four-man rush gets home, THEN the deep middle stays capped by the Mike running the hole.
IF the offense floods one deep half, THEN the corner over that side carries it while the safety helps over the top.
IF a back leaks to the flat, THEN the underneath white zone defender on that side squeezes it.
usage_notes: Beats: deep crossers and seams over the middle. Coach's Key: Mike must sink to the hole, the two deep zones split the field.

name: shinobi_sam_blitz_3

routes.note: Purple blitz path off the left edge
Four red rush arrows off the front
Lavender short zone on the left
Lavender short zone on the right
Green middle drop carrying the hole
Deep blue zone over the top, left
Deep blue zone over the top, right

reads: IF the Sam comes free off the edge, THEN bring heat now and force a quick throw.
IF the back picks up the Sam, THEN the four-man line rush still pressures the pocket.
IF the offense throws hot underneath, THEN the lavender short zones rally and tackle.
IF a vertical shows, THEN the three deep zones (blue plus green hole) keep the top capped.
usage_notes: Beats: slow developing drop-backs by adding the Sam to the rush. Coach's Key: five rushers with three deep zones behind, blitz the edge and stay sound over the top.

name: shinobi_ws_blitz_3

routes.note: Red arrows show the front rushing straight through the gaps at the snap.
Extra rusher walks down and adds to the red rush from the line of scrimmage.
Blue zones drop to thirds behind the rush.
Purple zones sink underneath to wall off the middle.
Yellow zone sits over the middle in front of the deep coverage.

reads: IF the back stays in to block, THEN the extra rusher gets home clean.
IF they max protect, THEN drop the blitzer and play the three deep zones honest.
IF the ball comes out hot, THEN squeeze the underneath purple zones to the throw.
usage_notes: Beats: dropback passing that holds the ball. Coach's Key: bring the weak-side pressure with a three-deep shell behind it.

name: shinobi_cover_2_contain

routes.note: Two blue zones split the deep field in half.
Teal zones jump the flats on each side.
Gray zones fill the middle hooks under the safeties.
Three red arrows rush while the ends keep contain.
Yellow zone sits over the deep middle seam.

reads: IF the offense throws the flat or curl, THEN the corner and hook defenders squeeze it.
IF a receiver runs the seam, THEN the safeties stay over the top and pass it off.
IF the quarterback scrambles, THEN the contain rushers keep him in the pocket.
usage_notes: Beats: short and intermediate passing while keeping the QB contained. Coach's Key: two deep, five under, ends hold the edge.

name: shinobi_cover_6_invert

routes.note: Blue zones split one side into quarters.
The opposite blue zone plays a deep half.
Purple and yellow zones drop and match the underneath routes.
Four red arrows rush the line at the snap.

reads: IF the route distribution flows strong, THEN the quarters side carries the verticals.
IF it floods the half side, THEN the safety stays on top and the underneath matches in.
IF nothing pushes vertical, THEN drive on the underneath throw.
usage_notes: Beats: balanced two-sided route concepts. Coach's Key: quarter-quarter-half with inverted match underneath.

name: shinobi_pinch_blitz

routes.note: Every red arrow angles inward, pinching the interior gaps.
Two white circles stay back over the top with no zone drawn.

reads: IF it is an obvious passing down, THEN bring the pinch and force a quick throw.
IF the back tries to release, THEN a rusher peels to account for him.
IF they hit a quick pass, THEN the two deep defenders rally and tackle.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing plays and weak protections. Coach's Key: heavy interior pressure, only two defenders left deep so it is high risk.

name: shinobi_cover_3_match-2

routes.note: Three blue zones split the deep field into thirds and pattern-match.
Purple zones fill the underneath and match the inside routes.
Four red arrows rush the line at the snap.

reads: IF a receiver runs vertical, THEN the deep-third defender carries him.
IF routes break off underneath, THEN the matching zone drops sink and rob them.
IF the offense floods one third, THEN pass off and match the next threat.
usage_notes: Beats: vertical and four-verticals concepts. Coach's Key: three deep, match the underneath instead of spot-dropping.

name: shinobi_cover_6-2

routes.note: Two blue zones split that side into quarters.
The other blue zone plays a deep half.
Teal zone jumps the flat on the half side.
Purple and yellow zones fill the underneath middle.
Four red arrows rush the line at the snap.

reads: IF the offense attacks the quarters side, THEN bracket the verticals with two over the top.
IF they work the half side, THEN the corner sinks under and the safety stays on top.
IF it is a quick flat throw, THEN the teal flat defender drives on it.
usage_notes: Beats: two-sided attacks where you want quarters one way and Cover 2 the other. Coach's Key: quarter-quarter-half coverage shell.

name: shinobi_ss_sam_crash_press

routes.note: Red rush arrow attacking the strong-side gap
Red arrow crossing into the interior gap
Cluster of short red rush arrows at the line of scrimmage
Blue lines pulling the three deep bubbles backward
Purple lines into the mid hook/curl bubbles

reads: Pre-snap: confirm the strong safety is walked down to the rush edge.
If the back stays in to block, the crashing Sam can free the safety.
If the offense slides protection to the rush, the underneath zones must cover the quick hot throw.
usage_notes: Beats: gap-scheme run and slow-developing pass to the strong side. Coach's Key: this is a strong-side pressure, the red arrows attack the right side of the formation.

name: shinobi_wk_corner_blitz

routes.note: Red rush arrow from the weak side toward the backfield
Row of short red arrows pushing across the line
Blue lines feeding the three deep bubbles
Purple lines into the mid hook/flat bubbles

reads: Pre-snap: identify which side the weak corner is rushing from.
If the offense throws hot to that side, an underneath dropper must replace the vacated flat.
If protection holds, the corner blitz brings the extra rusher home.
usage_notes: Beats: protections that ignore the weak edge. Coach's Key: the blitz comes off the boundary corner, the vacated flat is the soft spot.

name: shinobi_cover_3_match-3

routes.note: Three deep bubbles split the field into thirds
Light/white lines into the mid-level hook and curl bubbles
Four short red arrows off the line

reads: Pre-snap: this is a match-rules three-deep, the corners bail to the deep thirds.
If a vertical releases, the deep defender carries it as a match assignment.
If receivers stay short, pass them off and squeeze the underneath zones.
usage_notes: Beats: vertical concepts and four verticals by pattern-matching the routes. Coach's Key: COVERAGE call, only four rush, seven drop into match zones.

name: shinobi_cover_1_slant_crash

routes.note: Blue line dropping back to the lone deep bubble
Four straight-down red arrows from the box
Angled red arrow crashing inside from the right edge

reads: Pre-snap: confirm single-high with the free safety in the deep middle.
If the back releases, man defenders carry him out of the backfield.
If the protection slides, the crashing edge should slant into the open gap.
usage_notes: Beats: gap runs to the crash side and man-beater timing routes. Coach's Key: BLITZ with one deep safety, everyone underneath is in man with the crash setting the edge.

name: shinobi_free_fire

routes.note: Two angled red arrows crossing inside from the second level
Two straight-down red arrows from the line

reads: Pre-snap: this is an all-out interior fire, no deep safety shown.
If the back blocks up, one blitzer should come free inside.
If the QB feels the heat, expect a quick hot throw so get hands up in the rush lanes.
usage_notes: Beats: empty interior protection and slow drops. Coach's Key: BLITZ, this is a max interior pressure with no deep help, bring it and tackle.

name: shinobi_cover_1_fs_fire

routes.note: Blue line up to the lone deep bubble

routes.route: Fire blitz off the left edge
routes.note: Long red arrow angling in from the wide-left defender
Three angled red arrows funneling toward the middle

reads: Pre-snap: confirm the free safety stays deep middle for the single-high shell.
If the offense slides away from the edge fire, the blitzer comes clean.
If they throw hot to the blitz side, man defenders must squeeze the quick route.
usage_notes: Beats: protections that turn away from the edge pressure. Coach's Key: BLITZ with one high safety, the extra rusher is the field-side fire off the edge.

name: shinobi_cover_1_man

routes.note: Lone blue cap up top, drops straight back to patrol the deep middle.
Four short red arrows off the line, basic four-man rush.
One angled red arrow joins the rush from the second level.
Remaining X defenders locked in man across the underneath; one deep safety help only.

reads: IF you get one-on-one matchups across, THEN trust your rush to win before the man coverage breaks down.
IF the offense pushes a route deep down the middle, THEN the single high safety is your only help over the top.
IF a back leaks out, THEN make sure a man defender carries him, this look has no extra underneath zone.
usage_notes: Beats: standard dropbacks when you have rushers who win. Coach's Key: single high safety means tight man underneath, do not lose your deep middle.

name: shinobi_slant_weak_3

routes.note: Front red arrows angle to the weak side, line slants together that direction.
Three blue caps spread across the top, deep coverage behind the pressure.
Green zone sits over the middle underneath.
Purple zones drop to the flats and curls on each side.

reads: IF the back blocks weak, THEN your slanting line can free a rusher into the gap.
IF the ball comes out quick to the strong side, THEN the curl/flat zones squeeze it.
IF they take a shot deep, THEN your three deep caps stay on top.
usage_notes: Beats: weak-side runs and quick weak throws. Coach's Key: line slants weak while zone holds behind, pressure with a net under it.

name: shinobi_46_mid_blitz

routes.note: Lone blue cap up top stays back over the deep middle.
Four red arrows fire off the line.
Extra red arrows converge up the middle, multiple bodies attacking interior gaps.

reads: IF the protection can not account for the middle pressure, THEN a free rusher gets home fast.
IF the quarterback steps up, THEN the converging inside rush collapses the pocket on him.
IF they max protect, THEN trust the single high safety and make them throw on time.
usage_notes: Beats: slow developing pass plays and interior protection. Coach's Key: heavy middle pressure behind one deep safety, win before the ball comes out.

name: shinobi_hot_blitz_bail

white lines show two players dropping out of the blitz look (the bail)
outside players bail to deep blue zones
three blue deep zones across the top

IF the QB throws hot, THEN the two bailing underneath defenders are there to undercut.
IF the ball goes deep, THEN the three blue deep zones cap the field.
usage_notes: Beats: quick game and slow-developing dropbacks. Coach's Key: it shows pressure then bails two defenders into the throwing lanes.

name: shinobi_cover_6_willie

blue deep zones across the top, quarters to one side and half to the other

IF the play attacks the cover 2 half, THEN the corner sinks and the safety caps over the top.
IF it is underneath, THEN the hook and flat droppers rally to the catch.
usage_notes: Beats: deep shots into a split-field structure. Coach's Key: it is quarters to one side, cover 2 to the other.

two olive ovals with lines work the middle hook windows

olive oval and line up the middle, the Tampa runner carries the deep middle hole
teal ovals and lines to both sidelines cover the flats

IF the throw is to the flat, THEN the teal flat defenders jump it.
IF the ball goes over the top, THEN the two halves stay deep.

two olive ovals with white lines drop to the middle hooks

Red arrow off the line
Red arrow off the line

IF a route enters an underneath zone, THEN the hook and cloud defenders pass it off and stay in their landmarks.
usage_notes: Beats: vertical concepts and high-low stretches by splitting the field, quarters to one side and Cover 2 to the other. Coach's Key: it is a MATCH coverage, defenders carry verticals rather than spot-drop.

IF a shallow crosser shows THEN pass it off across the olive hook zones.
IF nothing comes open underneath THEN the rush should already be home from the three-man front.

reads: IF you read one deep safety, THEN expect man coverage underneath.
IF the back stays in, THEN you still have five rushers crashing the pocket.
IF the QB holds it, THEN the LB blitz collapses the pocket before man routes break.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing dropbacks. Coach's Key: man-free with five box rushers, get pressure or lose the man matchups.

name: shinobi_cover_3_cloud-3

routes.route: three deep blue zones across the top (Cover 3 shell)
routes.note: blue ovals spanning deep

routes.route: purple flat/cloud zone to one side (corner sits the flat)
routes.note: purple oval low to the field side

routes.route: two yellow hook/curl drops over the middle
routes.note: two beige ovals with yellow lines
short cluster of red arrows at the LOS

reads: IF the offense floods the cloud side, THEN the corner squats the flat under the deep third.
IF a seam shows, THEN the hook dropper widens to carry it.
IF nothing comes open, THEN the front rush finishes.
usage_notes: Beats: flat and curl-flat to the cloud side. Coach's Key: Cover 3 with one corner cloud over the flat instead of bailing.

name: shinobi_nickel_blitz_0

routes.route: rush (multiple red arrows attacking from across the front)
routes.note: one red arrow from the wide defender plus a fanned cluster of red arrows at the LOS

routes.route: white X defenders in man, no deep zone drawn (Cover 0)
routes.note: no blue or zone ovals anywhere

reads: IF there is no deep safety drawn, THEN this is all-out man pressure with no help.
IF a back blocks, THEN a rusher comes free elsewhere.
IF the QB cannot get it out fast, THEN the zero blitz wins.
usage_notes: Beats: defenses that fail to identify the free rusher. Coach's Key: Cover 0 pressure, win now or give up the big play.

name: shinobi_cover_3_sky-4

routes.route: three deep blue zones across the top (Cover 3 shell)
routes.note: blue ovals spanning deep

routes.route: two purple flat zones outside at the numbers (safety/force down)
routes.note: purple ovals both sides low

routes.route: two yellow hook/curl drops over the middle
routes.note: two beige ovals with yellow lines
short red arrows at the LOS

reads: IF an outside route attacks the flat, THEN the sky defender forces it under the deep third.
IF a vertical shows, THEN the deep-third defender stays on top.
IF the QB sits, THEN the front rush closes.
usage_notes: Beats: out and flat routes outside. Coach's Key: Cover 3 sky, force defenders roll down to the flats while corners play deep thirds.

name: shinobi_blitz_loop_0

routes.note: Marker up at the 30 on the left, red arrow loops down and inside toward the gap
Red arrow crashing downhill off the line
Red arrow straight ahead into the backfield
Mugged in the gap, red arrow firing forward
Red arrow angles across then attacks, pairing the loop on the back side

reads: IF you have the numbers up front, THEN send everyone and get home before the QB resets.
IF the back stays in to block, THEN the looper should be the free man, hit the open gap.
IF the QB feels the rush early, THEN keep rush lanes tight so he cannot step up and escape.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing dropbacks and empty looks. Coach's Key: this is a zero-coverage all-out send with two rushers looping. No safety help is drawn, so everyone has to win their rush or it is a big play the other way.

name: shinobi_redzone_dt_drop

routes.note: Yellow line: drops back and to the left off the line into a short zone instead of rushing
Red arrows: interior linemen fire straight ahead into the gaps
Red arrows up the middle
Red arrow straight upfield
Yellow lines run from the box out to the deep zone bubbles, splitting the field in two halves

reads: IF the dropping DT walls off the quick inside throw, THEN the rush gets home with a numbers edge.
IF the QB looks deep middle, THEN the two high defenders are sitting over the top.
IF nobody is open fast, THEN the interior rush should collapse the pocket.
usage_notes: Beats: quick inside game in the red zone. Coach's Key: the left DT is a coverage drop, not a rusher, plugging the hot throw behind the line.

name: shinobi_cover_3_sky-5

routes.note: Three blue zones split the deep field into thirds, the safety rotates down (Sky) so a corner and the deep safeties cap the top
Purple zones on each side sink to the curl and widen to the flat
Yellow lines: the two A-gap mug defenders bail out into the tan middle hook zones instead of rushing
Four red arrows fire straight ahead, the four down linemen bring the only pressure

reads: If the offense pushes a vertical down the sideline, then the deep-third defender and the rotated safety bracket it over the top.
If a receiver sits in the curl or works the flat, then the purple underneath defender squeezes it.
If a crosser or dig shows over the middle, then the two mug linebackers in the hooks wall it off.
usage_notes: Beats: vertical and sideline shots. Coach's Key: spot-drop Cover 3 with a Sky rotation, only the front four rush and both mugs drop to the hooks.

name: shinobi_nickel_sim_2_double_mug_pressure

routes.note: Two blue zones cap the field in halves behind the pressure (Cover 2 shell)
Teal zones drop and carry the outside, sinking under the deep halves
White line bails out of the mug look into the olive middle hole, the sim drops one of the shown rushers
Red arrows fire forward off the line, the mugged front sends the pressure while one drops to fake the double mug

reads: If the protection slides to the double-mug look, then one mug drops (white) and the other green-dog rushers create a free runner.
If the quarterback throws hot over the middle, then the dropper in the olive hole takes it away.
If the ball goes outside, then the two-deep halves and the teal underneath defenders rally and squeeze.
usage_notes: Beats: quick-game answers to mug pressure. Coach's Key: simulated pressure, it shows double mug then drops one defender to a two-deep shell so the count stays safe.

name: shinobi_over_storm_brave_blitz

routes.note: Square defender on the line, red arrow straight downhill into the backfield.
Circle showing slight depth, square on the line below it, red arrow drives down and slightly inside.
Circle with square on the line, red arrow straight downhill.
Square defender, red arrow straight downhill on the edge.

reads: Pre-snap: count the four red downhill arrows, this is a four-man pressure from the Nickel 2-4 front.
If the line slides one way, the free rusher attacks the opposite gap.
If the back stays in to block, the unblocked rusher gets home on the QB.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing dropback passes. Coach's Key: four bodies all triggering downhill, win with the unblocked rusher before the protection sorts it out.

name: shinobi_1_double_wr2_man_coverage

routes.note: Four white boxes on the line, each with a red downhill arrow attacking straight ahead.
Two white dots set just off the line behind the front, no rush arrow drawn.
X marks spread across the field covering receivers man-to-man, label reads MAN.

reads: Pre-snap: count the four red arrows, this is a straight four-man rush from the Nickel 2-4 front.
Everyone behind the rush is locked in man, so the back-end X defenders travel with their assigned man.
If your rush wins early, the man coverage behind it only has to hold for a beat.
If the QB scrambles, the man defenders turn and run, so the rush has to stay disciplined in its lanes.
usage_notes: Beats: timing-based quick passing. Coach's Key: four rush, the rest play man behind it.

name: shinobi_1_double_te_man_coverage-2

routes.note: Four white boxes on the line, each with a red downhill arrow rushing straight upfield.
Two white dots behind the front, no rush arrow, dropping into man assignments.
X marks spread across the field in man coverage, label reads MAN.

reads: Pre-snap: identify the four-man rush from the red arrows on the Nickel 2-4 front.
This is a man call, so the X defenders match up and travel with their receivers.
If the offense motions to find a matchup, your man defenders follow the motion across.
If nobody comes open quickly, the four rushers have to finish at the QB.
usage_notes: Beats: predictable route concepts against locked man. Coach's Key: four rush, man behind, follow your guy.

name: shinobi_1_double_wr1_man_coverage

routes.note: Four white boxes on the line, each with a red downhill arrow attacking forward.
Two white dots set behind the front, no rush arrow, in man assignments.
X marks spread across the field covering man-to-man, label reads MAN.

reads: Pre-snap: count four red arrows, four-man rush out of the Nickel 2-4.
It is a man call across the board, so back-end defenders lock onto their receivers.
If a receiver releases inside or outside, the man defender mirrors his release.
If the QB holds the ball, the four-man rush has to close and finish.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing routes against tight man. Coach's Key: four rush, lock man behind it.

name: shinobi_cover_1_robber-2

routes.note: Blue deep zone up top with a blue drop line, single high.
Green underneath zone with a yellow line, sitting in the middle hole.
Four down defenders with red arrows rushing.
MAN label; man across with the robber reading the QB.

reads: If the QB stares a crosser, the robber jumps the middle.
If they go deep, the single-high free safety has the top.
If the rush gets home, the robber takes away the hot throw.
usage_notes: Beats: in-breakers and digs over the middle. Coach's Key: single-high man with a robber baiting the inside throw.

name: shinobi_cover_1_lb_blitz-4

routes.note: Single blue deep zone with a blue drop line, single high.
Four down defenders with red arrows rushing.
One off-ball defender with a red arrow shooting downhill into the rush.
MAN-style man behind the pressure under the single-high look.

reads: If the blitzing linebacker comes free, get the ball out now.
If they max protect, the single-high safety caps the deep ball.
If the back releases, man coverage carries him.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing dropbacks. Coach's Key: add a fifth rusher off the second level, single-high man behind it.

name: shinobi_dbl_safety_blitz

routes.note: Two deep defenders (X marks) each with a red arrow blitzing down off the edges.
Four down defenders with red arrows rushing inside.
Two off-ball defenders (white dots) holding underneath.

reads: If both safeties come, there is no deep help, so this is a get-home call.
If protection holds the edges, the QB can hit the vacated middle.
If they screen it, the underneath defenders have to rally fast.
usage_notes: Beats: empty and long-developing concepts. Coach's Key: all-out safety pressure off both edges, win before the deep shot.

name: shinobi_cross_sim_2

routes.note: Three blue deep zones drawn across the top.
Teal zones on each side with cyan drop lines.
Gray hook zones and a green robber zone in the middle with white lines.
Two rushers crossing with a red X stunt at the line; other linemen drop (white lines).

reads: If the protection slides the wrong way, the crossing stunt frees a rusher.
If they throw hot, defenders bail into the zones behind the sim.
If the QB holds it, the crossers should arrive late but clean.
usage_notes: Beats: half-slide protections. Coach's Key: simulate pressure with a crossing twist, drop into zone behind it.

name: shinobi_tampa_2-4

routes.note: Two blue deep zones with blue drop lines.
Green deep-middle zone with a green line running to the hole between the halves.
Gray hook zones with white drop lines.
Teal flat zones on each side with cyan lines.
Four down defenders with red arrows rushing.

reads: If they attack the deep middle, the Mike running the seam closes that window.
If they sit in the curls, the hook droppers wall it off.
If the ball goes to the flat, the corner is sitting on it.
usage_notes: Beats: deep middle and curl concepts. Coach's Key: two deep with the Mike sprinting the pole, four-man rush.

name: shinobi_nickel_sim_2_fire_zone_blitz

routes.note: white square on the LOS, red arrow straight downhill into the backfield
white square on the LOS, red arrow straight ahead
white square on the LOS, red arrow straight ahead

routes.route: simulated pressure off the left edge
routes.note: white X off the line with a red arrow angling down across the LOS, the fourth rusher
white-to-green line dropping into the olive middle hook zone
white X on a blue line bailing into the left deep blue zone
white X on a blue line bailing into the right deep blue zone
white X sitting in the left teal flat zone
white X dropping out to the right teal flat zone on the cyan line

reads: IF the back stays in to protect, THEN the four-man pressure should still win one-on-one up front.
IF the QB looks deep middle, THEN the two safeties have the halves split, take away the post and seam.
IF the QB checks down hot to the flat, THEN the teal flat defenders are sitting right there to rally and tackle.
IF the offense max-protects, THEN drop the sim blitzer late and rush three to keep the 2-deep shell intact.
usage_notes: Beats: quick game and deep shots over the top. Coach's Key: 4 rush, simulated edge pressure with everyone else playing a 2-deep, 5-under fire zone behind it.

name: shinobi_cover_9_show_2

routes.note: Three blue deep zones with blue drop lines.
Olive match zones underneath; a magenta match zone to one side carrying a vertical.
Four down defenders with red arrows rushing.

reads: If the receiver runs vertical, the match defender carries him to the deep player.
If it stays underneath, the curl/hook defenders settle.
If the rush is slow, the three-deep match keeps a lid on top.
usage_notes: Beats: vertical and curl combos. Coach's Key: shows a two-shell but matches into a three-deep pattern-read.

name: shinobi_cover_4_palms

routes.note: Four blue deep zones with blue drop lines.
Magenta match zones to each side with magenta lines reading number two.
Green hook zone in the middle with a green line.
Four down defenders with red arrows rushing.

reads: If number two goes out, palms tells the corner to jump it and the safety takes number one.
If both go vertical, you stay in true quarters.
If they hit the hook, the underneath defender is sitting there.
usage_notes: Beats: smash and out routes by number two. Coach's Key: quarters with a palms switch on the two-receiver side.

name: shinobi_cover_4_quarters-4

routes.note: Four blue deep zones with blue drop lines.
Magenta match zones to each side with magenta lines.
Green hook zone in the middle with a green line.
Four down defenders with red arrows rushing.

reads: If the receivers go vertical, each quarter defender takes his deep man.
If number two runs an out, the safety can rob underneath.
If they check it down, the hook defender is waiting.
usage_notes: Beats: four verticals and deep shots. Coach's Key: true quarters match, keep everything in front.

name: shinobi_cover_1_hole-3

routes.note: Lone deep blue zone, caps the field over the top
Green zone sitting underneath, robs the middle, becomes QB spy
White X out wide left
White X inside left
White X inside right
White X out wide right
Four red arrows fanning out from the line of scrimmage

reads: IF the offense snaps, THEN your underneath defenders lock man on their assigned receivers across the line.
IF a receiver releases vertical, THEN trust the single deep safety over the top to cap the post.
IF nobody threatens the middle, THEN the hole player sits low and robs crossers and dig routes.
IF the QB scrambles, THEN the hole defender becomes the spy and squeezes the lane.
usage_notes: Beats: short crossers and shallow drags get robbed by the hole. Coach's Key: badge reads MAN. One deep safety (blue) plus a low hole defender (green) over four man defenders pressing at the line.

name: shinobi_cover_9_match

routes.note: Blue zone, left third
Blue zone, middle third
Blue zone, right third
Teal/cyan zone outside left
Olive/green underneath zones over the middle
Purple zone with line tracking up to the deep right
Four red arrows off the line of scrimmage

reads: IF the ball is snapped, THEN three deep defenders bail to thirds and three underneath defenders match the route distribution.
IF a slot runs vertical, THEN the underneath dropper carries him and passes him to the deep third.
IF routes stay short, THEN the flat and hook zones squeeze the underneath windows.
IF the front gets home, THEN the four-man rush keeps you sound behind it.
usage_notes: Beats: this is a 3-deep, 3-under match shell that pattern-matches verticals. Coach's Key: badge reads MATCH. Watch the right purple defender carry the seam.

name: shinobi_1_lb_dog

routes.note: Lone deep blue zone over the top
White X out wide left
White X inside left
White X to the right
Red arrow from the middle of the front pressing the gap
Red arrows fanning off the line beside the LB dog

reads: IF the ball is snapped, THEN the extra linebacker dogs through the A or B gap to add a rusher.
IF the offense slides protection, THEN the free deep safety stays home as the single high cap.
IF a hot route shows, THEN the blitz has to get home fast because the middle is light.
IF the back stays in to block, THEN you have a free man somewhere off the dog.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing dropbacks and empty protections that can't account for the extra LB. Coach's Key: badge reads BLITZ. Single deep safety (blue) behind a five-ish man pressure.

name: shinobi_tampa_2-5

routes.note: Blue zone, left half
Blue zone, right half
Green defender carrying the deep middle down the field
White zone over the left middle
White zone over the right middle
Cyan zone outside left
Cyan zone outside right
Four red arrows off the line of scrimmage

reads: IF the ball is snapped, THEN the two safeties split the deep halves and the middle linebacker runs the deep hole down the pipe.
IF a receiver attacks the seam, THEN the Tampa runner caps the deep middle so the halves stay outside.
IF routes break short, THEN the corners and hook defenders sink and wall the underneath.
IF the QB holds it, THEN the four-man rush has to finish.
usage_notes: Beats: deep seam and four-vertical concepts that try to split the safeties. Coach's Key: badge reads ZONE. The green Tampa runner is what makes this a 2-deep that plays like 3-deep.

name: shinobi_sim_pressure_3

routes.note: Three red rush lanes shown attacking the middle of the line
Two yellow short zone drops over the middle
Purple zone bubbles on each side
Three blue deep zone bubbles across the top

reads: If the offense max protects, the three drawn rushers create a simulated pressure look so back out and read the QB.
If a quick throw shows, the two middle hook droppers squeeze the underneath windows.
If the ball goes deep, the three deep zones split the field into thirds.
usage_notes: Coach's Key: simulated pressure, three rush and drop to a three-deep zone shell behind it.

name: shinobi_double_bracket_man_coverage

routes.note: Red down-arrow off the line of scrimmage
Red down-arrow off the line of scrimmage
Red down-arrow off the line of scrimmage
Red down-arrow off the line of scrimmage
Spread across the middle and second level, no drawn drop lines

routes.receiver: Deep defenders (white X marks near the 20)
routes.note: Two wide and two near the numbers up top

reads: IF the offense shows a clear single target, THEN bracket him with the two nearest defenders over the top and underneath.
IF the four front presses off the line, THEN expect tight man behind it with help up the seams.
IF a receiver releases vertical, THEN pass him off into the deep bracket shell.
usage_notes: Beats: concentrated single-receiver concepts. Coach's Key: four pressing the line with man behind, deep help to double the offense's best route.

name: shinobi_cover_2_man-3

routes.note: Two blue deep zone bubbles, one over each half
Four red man-match arrows pointing down at the line

reads: If a receiver releases, the matched defender trails him in man across the field.
If a route breaks deep, the two safeties cap each half over the top.
If protection holds, trust the man leverage underneath and let the halves erase the post and corner.
usage_notes: Beats: short and intermediate man-beaters are bracketed by two-deep help. Coach's Key: man under, two-deep over.

name: shinobi_cover_3_sky-6

routes.note: Three blue deep zone bubbles across the top
Two yellow short drops over the middle
Purple zone bubbles on each side

reads: If a vertical shows, the three deep defenders carry their thirds.
If the flat fills, the outside underneath defenders sink and rob it.
If a curl works open, the two middle hook droppers wall it off.
usage_notes: Coach's Key: three-deep, four-under sky rotation with the flats coming down from the outside.

name: shinobi_double_bracket_switch

routes.note: White square on the line with a red down-arrow attacking the backfield
White square on the line with a red down-arrow
White square on the line with a red down-arrow
White square on the line with a red down-arrow

routes.receiver: Coverage defenders (white X and dot markers)
routes.note: Static markers spread across the middle and second level, no drawn coverage lines (MAN label)

routes.receiver: Deep defenders (two white X near the 20)
routes.note: Two static X markers at the deepest level, no drawn lines

reads: If the offense drops to pass, the four squares rush the drawn arrows and collapse the pocket.
If you are a coverage defender, lock your man and trail through the route since the badge reads MAN.
If a receiver releases vertical, the two deep markers stay over the top to bracket the route.
usage_notes: Beats: dropback passing out of Dime personnel. Coach's Key: badge reads MAN. Only the four red rush arrows are drawn assignments, the coverage players are shown as static markers.

name: shinobi_tampa_2-6

routes.note: Two blue deep zone bubbles over each half
Green/yellow bubble with a vertical line up the middle, the Tampa runner
Two white short zone drops
Teal zone bubbles on each side
Four red down-arrows at the line releasing into underneath zones

reads: If a seam route runs up the middle, the Tampa dropper carries it deep between the safeties.
If the ball goes to the flat, the teal flat defenders sit on it.
If a route breaks deep outside, the two safeties cap their halves.
usage_notes: Beats: deep crossers and seams are squeezed by the middle runner. Coach's Key: two-deep with the middle dropper closing the Cover 2 hole.

name: shinobi_cover_1_hole-4

routes.note: Single blue deep bubble with a line back to a deep defender
Green bubble sitting underneath in the middle of the field
Four red man arrows pointing down at the line

reads: If receivers release, the four underneath defenders match man across the board.
If a crosser or dig comes through the middle, the hole defender robs it.
If a route runs deep, the single-high safety caps the post over the top.
usage_notes: Beats: in-breakers and shallow crossers get robbed by the hole player. Coach's Key: man free with a hole rat in the middle.

name: shinobi_fs_will_blitz_0

routes.note: Five red arrows all converging toward the QB from the line and two off-ball defenders
No deep help drawn; Blitz 0 label means man across with no safety

reads: If the offense keeps backs in, the five drawn rushers still outnumber the protection on one side.
If a hot route shows, the man defenders must squeeze it because there is no deep help.
If the QB holds the ball, the converging rush gets home fast.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing pass plays. Coach's Key: five-man pressure with zero coverage, win before the hot route.

name: shinobi_cover_1_robber_show_2

routes.note: Single blue deep bubble with a line to the deep defender
Green bubble underneath with a yellow line, sitting in the middle to rob
Red man arrows pointing down at the line

reads: If receivers release, the underneath defenders match man.
If a dig or crosser shows, the robber jumps the in-breaker.
If a route runs vertical, the single-high free safety caps the deep middle.
usage_notes: Beats: in-breaking routes over the middle. Coach's Key: shows a two-high look then rotates to man free with a robber.

name: shinobi_cover_3_match-6

routes.note: Three blue deep zone bubbles across the top
Two yellow short drops over the middle
Purple zone bubbles on each side
Four red down-arrows releasing into underneath zones

reads: If two receivers go vertical to a side, the deep defenders match and carry them.
If only one goes deep, the underneath defenders pattern-match the shorter routes.
If the flat shows, the outside curl/flat defender drives on it.
usage_notes: Beats: vertical concepts by matching routes instead of spot-dropping. Coach's Key: three-deep match coverage that plays like man against verticals.

name: shinobi_cover_4_quarters-5

routes.note: Four blue deep zones, each defender bails to a quarter of the field (blue drop lines)
Purple zone left, drops to underneath area
Olive zone over the middle
Purple zone right, drops to underneath area

reads: IF the offense throws deep, THEN four-over-the-top quarters keeps everything in front and bracketed.
IF a back releases or a crosser hits the middle, THEN the olive hook defender squeezes it.
IF the ball goes to the flat, THEN the purple underneath zones rally up and tackle short.
usage_notes: Beats: deep shots and four verticals. Coach's Key: soft over the top, give up the underneath, never the home run.

name: shinobi_cover_3_buzz_press

routes.note: Three blue deep zones, drop lines split the field into thirds
Olive zone, robs the middle hook area
Olive zone buzzing down to the middle
Purple zone, drops to the underneath flat
Purple zone, drops to the underneath flat

reads: IF receivers press release outside, THEN corners reroute then bail to deep thirds.
IF a crosser or seam shows, THEN the buzz defenders sink and wall the middle.
IF the throw is to the flat, THEN the purple flat defenders break up and squeeze.
usage_notes: Beats: short and intermediate crossers. Coach's Key: press at the line to slow releases, then buzz the underneath middle.

name: shinobi_cover_1_robber_press-2

routes.note: One blue deep zone over the top
Olive zone underneath in the middle, reads the QB
Four white X defenders aligned in press man across the formation

reads: IF the receiver runs any route, THEN press man defenders travel with him step for step.
IF the QB stares down a crosser or dig, THEN the robber jumps the in-breaker.
IF a deep ball goes up, THEN the single-high safety helps over the top.
usage_notes: Beats: in-breakers and timing routes over the middle. Coach's Key: press at the line, let the robber bait and rob the dig.

name: shinobi_cover_6_match

routes.note: Blue deep zones split: two quarters one side, a deeper half coverage the other
Purple zone left underneath
Olive zones over the middle and right matching routes
Cyan/teal zone to the right flat

reads: IF strength is to the quarters side, THEN that side plays Cover 4 matching verticals.
IF the offense attacks the half-field side, THEN that corner and safety bracket Cover 2 style.
IF routes settle underneath, THEN the olive and purple zones match and pass them off.
usage_notes: Beats: formations that flood one side. Coach's Key: split the field, quarters to the field, half to the boundary, match everything.

name: shinobi_tampa_2-7

routes.note: Two blue deep zones split the deep field in half
Olive zone carrying the deep middle to close the Tampa 2 hole
Two gray hook zones over the middle
Two teal/cyan flat zones to either sideline

reads: IF a seam threatens the deep middle, THEN the middle dropper runs the pole and takes it away.
IF the offense works the flats, THEN the two flat defenders jump the short throws.
IF a dig or curl shows, THEN the hook defenders wall it inside.
usage_notes: Beats: deep middle seams and high-low flat concepts. Coach's Key: two deep, five under, and the Mike runs the pole to plug the hole.

name: shinobi_lb_blitz_1

routes.note: One blue deep zone over the top
Four red arrows from the box attacking the LOS, two outside two inside
White X defenders left over to cover man underneath behind the blitz

reads: IF the ball is snapped, THEN four rushers fire from the box to pressure the QB.
IF a receiver runs a route, THEN the remaining defenders lock man underneath.
IF the QB looks deep, THEN the single-high safety caps everything over the top.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing dropbacks. Coach's Key: bring four from the box behind one deep safety, get home before the route breaks.

name: shinobi_cover_6_press

routes.note: purple zone left, defender carries vertical then sinks to the deep quarter
teal zone far right, plays over the top
two blue deep zones up top, quarter-quarter-half look
olive and tan zones across the middle
three red arrows attack the line of scrimmage

reads: IF you get press at the line, THEN expect bump-and-run on the outside receivers.
IF the deep shell stays split (quarter side and half side), THEN attack the soft spot between the corner and safety.
IF only three rush, THEN the underneath zones flood the hooks and flats.
usage_notes: Beats: outside verticals and posts into the quarter-half boundary. Coach's Key: split-field shell, three deep with pattern-match underneath.

name: shinobi_cover_4_drop-2

routes.note: purple zones outside, bail to the deep fourths
two blue zones up top split the deep field into fourths
two tan zones drop and wall the middle (yellow drop lines)
three red arrows rush the passer

reads: IF four defenders bail deep, THEN the field is split into quarters underneath the routes.
IF the hooks drop and wall, THEN the middle is taken away, work the flats and out-breakers.
IF only three rush, THEN expect extra bodies in coverage, hold the ball and pressure can be late.
usage_notes: Beats: short outs, flats, and underneath crossers in front of the quarters. Coach's Key: four deep, drop-zone underneath, soft over the top.

name: shinobi_cover_2_sink

routes.note: two blue zones up top split the deep field in halves
teal zones outside, jam and sink under the half
grey and olive zones drop and sink to wall the middle
four red arrows attack the line

reads: IF two safeties sit deep halves, THEN the deep middle (the hole) opens behind the sinking hooks.
IF the corners sink under, THEN the flats are squeezed, work the seam and deep hole.
IF four rush, THEN there is a void underneath, take the short throw if the seam is covered.
usage_notes: Beats: the deep middle hole shot and seam routes splitting the two safeties. Coach's Key: two-deep with everyone sinking, soft in the deep middle.

name: shinobi_spinner_dog_3

routes.note: three blue zones up top, three-deep shell behind the pressure
purple zones to each side and an olive hook in the middle (yellow drop line)
multiple red arrows, several rushers crossing off the edge and interior

reads: IF extra rushers come (the dog), THEN get the ball out hot before the pressure arrives.
IF three deep stays back, THEN deep shots are capped, attack the underneath voids quickly.
IF the middle hook drops, THEN throw the flats and quick outs away from the spin pressure.
usage_notes: Beats: quick game and hot throws into the soft underneath as the pressure gets home. Coach's Key: three-deep zone blitz, sim-pressure with crossing rushers.

name: shinobi_mike_ss_3_seam

routes.note: three blue zones across the top, three-deep coverage
purple zones to each side and an olive hook drop in the middle (yellow line)
interior pressure, several red arrows crossing through the A and B gaps

reads: IF the Mike and strong safety blitz, THEN interior protection is stressed, expect quick pressure up the middle.
IF three deep plays behind it, THEN the seams are buzzed, do not force the vertical.
IF the drop defenders take the seams, THEN dump it to the flats or check down.
usage_notes: Beats: quick game and flats away from the interior pressure. Coach's Key: three-deep with seam buzz, Mike and SS bringing inside heat.

name: shinobi_cross_3_fire

routes.note: three blue zones up top, three-deep shell behind the fire
purple zones each side and an olive hook in the middle (yellow drop)
two red arrows cross in the middle (the X), edge rushers added outside

reads: IF the interior rushers cross (the fire), THEN the protection can get picked, look for quick pressure.
IF three deep stays home, THEN the deep ball is capped, attack underneath as the blitz commits.
IF the hooks drop, THEN throw hot to the flat or check down off the pressure.
usage_notes: Beats: quick hot routes and flats against the crossing interior pressure. Coach's Key: three-deep zone fire with crossing inside rushers.

name: shinobi_db_sting_2_buzz

routes.note: two blue zones up top split the deep field in halves
teal zones outside, drop and buzz the curl-flat
grey and olive zones buzz down to wall the middle (white and yellow drop lines)
five or more red arrows, a defensive back stings off the edge with the front

reads: IF a DB stings off the edge, THEN the protection is outnumbered, get the ball out fast.
IF two safeties stay deep halves, THEN the middle hole opens under the buzz, work the seam.
IF the curl-flat defenders buzz, THEN throw the quick out or check down away from the sting.
usage_notes: Beats: quick game, the deep middle hole, and throws away from the DB pressure. Coach's Key: two-deep buzz with a defensive back blitz.

name: shinobi_cover_3_lock

routes.note: Blue deep zone bailing to the left third
Blue deep zone over the middle
Blue deep zone bailing to the right third
Purple drop to curl-flat on the left
Purple drop to curl-flat on the right
Two interior defenders carry the hook/middle zones (yellow)
Three-man rush off the line (red)

reads: IF the offense pushes a vertical down the seam, THEN the hook defenders wall it before the safeties take over.
IF a receiver locks on the outside, THEN the deep-third defender plays it man-style over the top.
IF the ball goes underneath to the flat, THEN the curl-flat defender rallies up to make the tackle.
usage_notes: Beats: deep shots and four verticals. Coach's Key: three deep stay home while underneath defenders lock and carry.

name: shinobi_cover_4_palms-2

routes.note: Four blue deep zones splitting the field into quarters
Reads number two and drives to the flat (palms)
Reads number two and drives to the flat (palms)
Interior defender carries the middle hook (yellow)
Three rushers, the middle one shows a longer angled rush (red)

reads: IF number two runs out to the flat, THEN the palms defender jumps it and the safety caps number one.
IF number two goes vertical, THEN the safety stays on top in quarters.
IF the offense throws the smash or curl-flat, THEN the underneath defender drives down on the throw.
usage_notes: Beats: smash, curl-flat, and out-breaking combos. Coach's Key: corner and safety pattern-match the two-receiver side.

name: shinobi_ss_zone_blitz

routes.note: Safety fires downhill on the pressure (red)
Multiple red rush arrows attacking the line
Blue deep third
Blue deep third over the middle
Blue deep third
Purple drop covering the vacated underneath area
Purple drop covering the vacated underneath area
Interior dropper covers the middle hook (yellow)

reads: IF the protection slides away from the safety, THEN the strong safety comes free off the edge.
IF the quarterback throws hot, THEN the dropping zone defenders sit on the underneath windows.
IF nothing is open quick, THEN three deep keep everything in front.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing dropbacks. Coach's Key: strong safety pressure with a three-deep zone shell behind it.

name: shinobi_edge_blitz_1

routes.note: Four red rush arrows attacking off the edges and interior
One blue deep zone capping the middle of the field

reads: IF the offense keeps a back in to protect, THEN the extra edge rusher still outnumbers the blockers.
IF the quarterback climbs the pocket, THEN the single deep defender keeps the top on any shot.
IF the ball comes out hot underneath, THEN the rush has to win fast since coverage is thin.
usage_notes: Beats: max-protect dropbacks where the offense leaves no quick answer. Coach's Key: heavy edge pressure with one deep safety as the only true coverage.

name: shinobi_cover_3_buzz_match

routes.note: Blue deep third
Blue deep third over the middle
Blue deep third
Defender buzzes down to the middle hook/curl area (yellow)
Purple curl-flat drop
Purple curl-flat drop
Interior hook defenders match underneath crossers (yellow)
Four red rush arrows

reads: IF a vertical hits the seam, THEN the buzz defender matches it before it reaches the safety.
IF crossers come underneath, THEN the hook defenders pass them off and match.
IF the throw goes to the flat, THEN the curl-flat defender drives up to tackle.
usage_notes: Beats: seam verticals and crossers. Coach's Key: a defender buzzes down to wall the middle while three deep stay on top.

name: shinobi_cover_3_cloud-4

routes.note: Blue deep third
Blue deep third over the middle
Blue deep third
Cloud corner sinks to the flat on the right (cyan)
Purple curl-flat drop on the left
Interior hook/curl droppers (yellow)
Three red rush arrows

reads: IF a quick out or smash hits the cloud side, THEN the cloud corner squats and drives on the flat throw.
IF the offense runs four verticals, THEN three deep defenders carry and the cloud corner sinks under the fade.
IF the ball works the middle, THEN the hook droppers wall it off.
usage_notes: Beats: smash and quick flat throws to the cloud side. Coach's Key: corner clouds the flat while the rotation keeps three deep.

name: shinobi_overload_3_seam_press

routes.note: Multiple red rush arrows overloading one side of the line
Blue deep third
Blue deep third over the middle
Blue deep third
Purple curl-flat drop
Purple curl-flat drop
Interior defender presses and carries the seam (yellow)

reads: IF the protection cannot account for the overload, THEN a rusher comes free fast.
IF a receiver attacks the seam, THEN the seam defender presses and carries it to the deep zone.
IF the quarterback throws hot outside, THEN the curl-flat defenders sit on the throw.
usage_notes: Beats: protections that slide the wrong way. Coach's Key: overload one edge while three deep and a seam press hold the back end.

name: shinobi_hot_blitz_3-2

routes.note: Several red rush arrows showing a heavy interior and edge rush
Blue deep third
Blue deep third over the middle
Blue deep third
Two interior defenders drop to the hook/curl windows (yellow)

reads: IF the offense does not block everyone, THEN a free rusher gets home on the blitz.
IF the quarterback throws hot over the middle, THEN the two hook droppers take it away.
IF the offense goes deep, THEN three deep zones keep the top capped.
usage_notes: Beats: empty and quick-game looks that leave a rusher unblocked. Coach's Key: heavy rush with three deep and two hooks as the only coverage.

name: shinobi_fs_zone_blitz

routes.note: Free safety fires downhill from depth (red)
Red rush arrows attacking the line
Blue deep third
Blue deep third over the middle
Blue deep third
Purple curl-flat drop
Purple curl-flat drop
Interior dropper covers the middle hook (yellow)

reads: IF the offense slides protection away from the safety, THEN the free safety comes free up the middle.
IF the quarterback throws hot, THEN the curl-flat and hook droppers take the underneath windows.
IF the offense goes deep, THEN three deep zones stay on top.
usage_notes: Beats: interior protection that ignores the deep middle. Coach's Key: free safety pressure with a three-deep zone shell behind it.

name: shinobi_cover_1_thief

routes.note: Blue oval up top with a blue drop line, bails to the deep middle third as the lone high defender
Olive-green oval over the middle with a green line, sits underneath to rob crossers and digs
Four white boxes at the line with red arrows straight ahead, four-man rush

reads: IF you have a deep crosser, THEN the robber drives on it underneath.
IF the offense goes vertical down the middle, THEN the single-high safety carries it.
IF blockers hold up the four rushers, THEN the man defenders stay glued in trail technique.
usage_notes: Beats: deep crossers and posts over the middle. Coach's Key: single-high man coverage with a robber sitting in the hole to thief the dig.

name: shinobi_cover_2_man_spy

routes.note: Blue oval upper left with a blue drop line into the left deep half
Blue oval upper right with a blue drop line into the right deep half
Brown oval over the middle, mirrors the quarterback
Three white boxes with red arrows rushing straight ahead

reads: IF the QB takes off to run, THEN the spy mirrors and contains him.
IF a receiver works deep, THEN the two safeties split the halves over the top.
IF underneath routes break, THEN the man defenders trail in coverage.
usage_notes: Beats: scrambling QBs and underneath man routes. Coach's Key: two deep safeties split the field while a spy mirrors the quarterback.

name: shinobi_cover_4_drop-3

routes.note: Blue drop line to the deep-left zone oval. Carries any vertical to his outside fourth.
Blue drop to the inner deep zone. Splits the field on his half with the strong safety.
Blue drop to the inner deep zone. Two-high look, four over the top.
Blue drop line to the deep-right zone oval. Outside fourth.
Inner olive zone. Drops to the curl/hook area in front of the deep coverage.
Inner olive zone. Mirrors the left hook/curl dropper.
Lavender line angling out and down to the flat. Sinks under the deep quarter on his side.
Lavender line angling out and down to the flat. Mirrors the left flat dropper.
Red arrows straight ahead from the white squares at the line. Three-man rush, eight in coverage.

reads: IF you only see a three-man rush, THEN expect a soft drop-eight shell: get to your zone landmark first, do not freelance.
IF a receiver runs vertical, THEN the deep-quarter defender on that side carries him; the underneath dropper passes him off and sinks.
IF the throw goes underneath to a flat or hook, THEN rally and tackle in front; you are giving up the short stuff on purpose.
IF the QB holds the ball, THEN your three rushers have to win one-on-one or collapse the pocket, since there is no extra pressure coming.
usage_notes: Beats: deep shots and four verticals (four over the top). Coach's Key: two-high quarters with a three-man rush, eight defenders dropping. Keep everything in front, tackle the underneath catch.

name: shinobi_cover_2_spy

routes.note: Blue oval upper left with a blue drop line into the left deep half
Blue oval upper right with a blue drop line into the right deep half
Olive-green oval centered with a green vertical line, sits on the QB
Cyan ovals to each side dropping to the flats
White boxes with red arrows rushing straight ahead

reads: IF the QB pulls it down to scramble, THEN the spy meets him in the middle.
IF a vertical threatens, THEN the two safeties cap the deep halves.
IF a route hits the flat, THEN the cloud defenders jump it.
usage_notes: Beats: mobile QBs with a two-deep zone behind it. Coach's Key: two deep halves, cloud flats, and a spy holding the middle.

name: shinobi_tampa_2-8

routes.note: blue deep zone, splits the deep field left
blue deep zone, splits the deep field right
green vertical line sinking up the middle seam
white zone drop
white zone drop
cyan flat zone
cyan flat zone
four red rush arrows

reads: IF the offense throws a deep seam, THEN the sinking middle defender carries it.
IF a route hits the flat, THEN the outside cyan zones squeeze it.
IF nothing develops underneath, THEN keep both deep halves capped.
usage_notes: Beats: deep middle seams and verticals. Coach's Key: the middle dropper closes the Cover 2 hole.

name: shinobi_cover_2_hard_flat

routes.note: blue deep zone
blue deep zone
green drop up the middle
white zone drop
white zone drop
cyan flat zone, jumps the flat fast
cyan flat zone, jumps the flat fast
four red rush arrows

reads: IF a back or receiver leaks to the flat, THEN the corner drives down hard on it.
IF the throw goes over the corner, THEN the deep half safety takes it.
IF routes flood the middle, THEN the hook droppers wall them off.
usage_notes: Beats: quick flats and out routes. Coach's Key: corners squat hard on the flat instead of bailing.

name: shinobi_will_buck_3_press

routes.note: purple deep zone, pressed at line
purple deep zone
purple deep zone, pressed at line
green underneath zone
purple blitz path off the edge
red rush arrows with a buck stunt

reads: IF the line slides, THEN the Will buck loops to the open gap.
IF the QB climbs the pocket, THEN the green middle defender spies him.
IF a deep ball goes up, THEN the three pressed defenders hold their thirds.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing dropbacks. Coach's Key: Will buck adds pressure behind a 3-deep shell.

name: shinobi_cover_4_quarters-6

routes.note: purple deep zone
purple deep zone
purple deep zone
purple deep zone
green underneath drop
four red rush arrows

reads: IF two verticals release, THEN each quarter defender matches his man.
IF only one receiver goes deep, THEN the extra safety robs the dig or post.
IF routes stay short, THEN the green hook defender squeezes the middle.
usage_notes: Beats: four verticals and deep shots. Coach's Key: four-over-the-top, match each quarter.

name: shinobi_cover_1_robber-3

routes.note: blue deep zone over the top
green zone sitting underneath to read the QB
white man assignments on receivers
four red rush arrows

reads: IF the QB stares a crosser or dig, THEN the robber jumps it.
IF a receiver wins deep, THEN the single-high safety helps over the top.
IF man defenders stay tight, THEN the QB has to beat the rush.
usage_notes: Beats: in-breaking routes and crossers. Coach's Key: robber bait the middle while man holds outside.

name: shinobi_man_3_deep

routes.note: Blue zone bubble over the left third with a coverage line back toward the deep middle
Blue zone bubble centered over the middle third
Blue zone bubble over the right third
Four white X defenders spread across the middle level, marked for man assignments with a white reference dot at the snap point
White box at the line, red arrow driving straight upfield
White box at the line, red arrow driving straight upfield
White box at the line, red arrow driving straight upfield

reads: Pre-snap: confirm the three deep bubbles are split into thirds. This is a three-deep shell with man underneath.
If the offense runs deep verticals, trust the three deep defenders to cap the field and stay on top.
If a receiver breaks underneath, the man defenders carry him across the field with no zone help inside.
Only three are rushing, so get pressure home quickly before the man coverage breaks down.
usage_notes: Beats: deep shots and four verticals. Coach's Key: three deep over the top, man across the middle, three-man rush. Soft underneath, so make the offense earn short completions.

name: shinobi_tampa_2-9

routes.note: Four red arrows show a four-man rush off the line
Two teal zones drop to the flats
Pale middle zone with a white line showing the defender carrying the seam up the pipe
Two blue zones split the deep field in halves

reads: Pre-snap: two deep blue zones and a middle runner means this is a two-high shell with the hole player running the pipe.
If the offense runs a vertical down the middle, the Tampa defender carries it deep and the two safeties stay over the top.
If they throw the flat, the teal cloud defenders are waiting underneath.
Drive the corners and curls: the soft spot is the intermediate sideline, so break hard on the out-breaking routes.
usage_notes: Beats: deep middle seams and four-vertical looks. Coach's Key: two-deep shell with the middle defender carrying the seam, classic Tampa 2.

name: shinobi_3_double_buzz

routes.note: Two short red arrows show the down line attacking the gaps
Two purple zones drop underneath toward the curl/flat areas on each side
Pale and green middle zones settle over the ball, white lines show the drops
Three blue zones cap the deep field in thirds

reads: Pre-snap: three rushers and two purple defenders buzzing down means this is a three-deep with the safeties dropping to the curl.
If the offense throws the curl or dig, the buzz defenders are driving down into those windows.
If they attack vertical, the three blue deep zones cap each third.
Make them check it down: the underneath is loaded, so let the short throw happen and rally.
usage_notes: Beats: curls, digs, and intermediate in-breakers. Coach's Key: three-deep with both safeties buzzing the curl, heavy underneath wall.

name: shinobi_cover_6_invert-2

routes.note: Red arrows show the down line pressing the line of scrimmage
On one side, a pale zone and an inverting defender play quarters, white/yellow lines show the match technique
Purple zone drops to the flat on the cloud side
Blue and teal deep zones split the field, one half playing two and the other playing quarters, the Cover 6 (quarter-quarter-half) look

reads: Pre-snap: the deep zones are uneven, one side is quarters and the other is a deep half. That split-field look is Cover 6.
If the offense attacks the quarters side, the inverting defenders match the verticals.
If they attack the two-deep side, the half safety caps it and the flat defender drives the out.
Set the strength: the coverage tilts by formation, so confirm which side has the quarters before the snap.
usage_notes: Beats: balanced formations and high-low sideline concepts. Coach's Key: split-field Cover 6, quarters to one side, two-deep to the other, with an inverting safety. Art is busy so confidence is medium.

name: shinobi_cover_2_roll-2

routes.note: Red arrows show the down line attacking the line of scrimmage
Two teal zones drop to the flats
Green middle zone with a white line settling over the ball
Two blue zones split the deep field in halves, the look rolls to a two-high shell

reads: Pre-snap: two deep blue zones means a two-high shell, with the coverage rolling to Cover 2.
If the offense throws the flat, the teal corners squeeze the out and the flat.
If they go vertical, the two deep halves cap each side over the top.
Squeeze the sideline: the soft spot is the deep corner, so the half safety and corner have to sink and bracket the fade.
usage_notes: Beats: underneath crossers and short flats. Coach's Key: two-deep, five-under zone with the coverage rolled, hard corners on the flat.

name: shinobi_double_bracket-3

routes.note: Three down linemen send red arrows straight ahead
White dot drops in coverage
Second white dot drops in coverage

reads: IF a primary target is bracketed, THEN the QB has to go elsewhere.
IF the run shows, THEN the dropping defenders rally up.
IF the QB holds the ball, THEN the three-man rush has to finish.
usage_notes: Beats: a single star receiver. Coach's Key: man principles with help, take away the favorite target.

name: shinobi_hot_blitz_3-3

routes.note: Red arrows from the three down linemen
White dot fires a red arrow through the gap
Second white dot fires a red arrow through the gap
Yellow lines drop into the tan hook zones
Blue lines bail to three deep zones

reads: IF the protection cannot pick up the extra rushers, THEN the pressure gets home.
IF the QB throws hot, THEN the underneath hook defenders are sitting on it.
IF a vertical clears, THEN the three deep zones stay over the top.
usage_notes: Beats: max protect that is still a man short. Coach's Key: five rush with three deep behind it.

name: shinobi_tampa_2-10

routes.note: Three down linemen send red arrows straight ahead
Blue lines split the deep field into halves
Yellow line runs the middle defender up the pole to wall the deep middle
Cyan lines drop to the cyan flat zones
White lines settle in the gray hook zones

reads: IF a seam route splits the safeties, THEN the middle runner carries it up the pole.
IF the ball goes to the flat, THEN the flat defender drives.
IF the offense attacks the deep halves, THEN the two safeties stay on top.
usage_notes: Beats: deep crossers and high-low flat concepts. Coach's Key: the middle defender runs to the deep hole, it is Tampa 2 not regular 2.

name: shinobi_cover_4_drop_field-3

routes.note: Three red arrows straight ahead, one front defender drops
Four blue lines split the field into deep fourths
Yellow lines drop into the tan hook zones
Purple lines drop to the curl-flat windows

reads: IF a vertical pushes to the field, THEN the quarter defender on that side carries it.
IF the throw is underneath, THEN the dropping defender squeezes the window.
IF the run shows, THEN the safeties trigger from depth.
usage_notes: Beats: field-side route concepts. Coach's Key: quarters coverage with an extra dropper to the field, keep it in front.

name: shinobi_cover_3_sky-7

routes.note: Three down linemen send red arrows straight ahead
Blue lines bail to three deep zones
White lines drop into the tan hook zones
Purple lines drop to the curl-flat windows

reads: IF a vertical breaks deep, THEN the three deep zones stay on top.
IF the flat shows, THEN the sky defender (rolled-down safety) drives on it.
IF a hook route sits, THEN the underneath defenders wall it off.
usage_notes: Beats: outside vertical concepts. Coach's Key: a safety rolls down to the flat, it is Cover 3 Sky support.

name: shinobi_cover_6-4

routes.note: Three down linemen send red arrows straight ahead
Blue and yellow lines split one half into fourths
Cyan and purple lines play half over a sinking flat on the other side
Yellow lines fill the tan hook zones

reads: IF the offense attacks the quarters side deep, THEN that defender carries the vertical.
IF the route attacks the Cover 2 side flat, THEN the corner sinks and the half safety stays on top.
IF the run shows, THEN the deep defenders trigger from their split-field zones.
usage_notes: Beats: formations that favor one side. Coach's Key: quarter-quarter-half, two coverages stitched together by field and boundary.

name: shinobi_gaps_all_lb

routes.receiver: Full front (7 box defenders incl. LBs)
routes.note: Seven red squares with red arrows firing forward, the linebackers added into the rush so everyone up front is coming.
The inside arrows attack the A and B gaps straight downhill.
The LBs that would normally drop are instead pointed forward into their gaps, making this an all-hands rush.
White dots and X remain behind the line with no drawn drops, manning up the goal line.

reads: IF it is a run, THEN you have a body in every gap, meet the ball carrier immediately.
