reads: IF the offense attacks the quarters side, THEN the two deep defenders split it in half.
IF the throw goes to the cover-two half, THEN the deep defender plays over the top of the flat.
IF the ball works the middle, THEN the hook defender walls it.
usage_notes: Beats: combo routes that flood one side. Coach's Key: quarter-quarter-half coverage matching strength.

name: shinobi_dbl_safety_go-2

routes.note: Safety fires down from depth on the left edge (red)
Safety fires down from depth on the right edge (red)
Interior linemen rush, multiple red arrows fanning out

reads: IF the offense cannot block both safeties, THEN pressure comes off both edges at once.
IF the quarterback throws hot, THEN the rush has to win immediately since coverage is empty behind it.
IF the offense max-protects, THEN someone still comes free off the overload.
usage_notes: Beats: long-developing dropbacks. Coach's Key: both safeties go on an all-out edge pressure with no deep help.

name: shinobi_tampa_2-16

routes.note: Blue deep half
Blue deep half
Middle defender carries the deep middle hole between the safeties (yellow)
Corner sinks to the flat (cyan)
Corner sinks to the flat (cyan)
Interior hook/curl droppers (yellow)
Four red rush arrows

reads: IF a receiver splits the safeties down the middle, THEN the Tampa defender runs with it deep.
IF the throw goes to the flat, THEN the corner squats and drives on it.
IF the offense attacks the deep outside, THEN the half safety plays over the top.
usage_notes: Beats: deep crossers and verticals up the seam. Coach's Key: middle defender carries the deep hole to close the Cover 2 weakness.

name: shinobi_cover_3_hard_flat

routes.note: Blue deep third
Blue deep third over the middle
Blue deep third
Defender drives hard to the left flat (cyan)
Defender drives hard to the right flat (cyan)
Two interior hook/curl droppers (yellow)
Four red rush arrows

reads: IF a quick out or flat route shows, THEN the hard-flat defender jumps it immediately.
IF the offense runs four verticals, THEN three deep carry and the flat defenders sink under.
IF the ball works the middle hook, THEN the interior droppers wall it.
usage_notes: Beats: quick out and flat throws. Coach's Key: flat defenders drive hard underneath while three deep stay on top.

name: shinobi_cover_1_robber_press-4

routes.note: One blue deep zone capping the middle
Defender sits in the hole as the robber (yellow)
Four red rush arrows driving downhill

reads: IF a crosser or dig comes inside, THEN the robber jumps it in the hole.
IF the offense presses a vertical, THEN the single high safety stays on top.
IF a receiver beats press man, THEN the deep safety has to help over the top.
usage_notes: Beats: dig and crossing routes over the middle. Coach's Key: press man on the outside with a robber lurking under and one deep safety.

name: shinobi_cover_4_quarters-8

routes.note: Blue deep quarter
Blue deep quarter
Blue deep quarter
Blue deep quarter
Purple curl-flat drop
Purple curl-flat drop
Interior dropper covers the middle hook (yellow)
Three red rush arrows

reads: IF number two runs vertical, THEN the quarter defender stays on top of it.
IF number two breaks underneath, THEN the safety robs the inside and the corner caps number one.
IF the offense throws to the flat, THEN the curl-flat defender drives up.
usage_notes: Beats: deep shots and four verticals. Coach's Key: four deep defenders pattern-match every vertical threat.

name: shinobi_cover_6_match-3

routes.note: Two deep quarter zones matching the Cover 4 side
Blue deep half on the Cover 2 side
Corner clouds the flat on the half side (cyan)
Purple curl-flat drop
Interior hook/curl droppers (yellow)
Three red rush arrows

reads: IF the offense attacks the quarters side, THEN those defenders pattern-match the verticals.
IF a quick throw hits the cloud side, THEN the corner squats on the flat.
IF the offense floods the half side, THEN the deep half plays over the top.
usage_notes: Beats: formations that isolate a single receiver weak. Coach's Key: quarters to the strength, cover two to the weak cloud side.

name: shinobi_zero_blitz

routes.note: Five-plus red rush arrows fanning out across the line
Extra defender adds to the all-out pressure (red)

reads: IF the offense leaves anyone unblocked, THEN that rusher gets home immediately.
IF the quarterback throws hot, THEN man defenders have to win one-on-one with no deep help.
IF the offense screens it, THEN the all-out rush can get exposed.
usage_notes: Beats: slow dropbacks and undisciplined protections. Coach's Key: all-out Cover 0 pressure with no safety help.

name: shinobi_db_fire_2

routes.note: Blue deep half
Blue deep half
Defender covers the left flat (cyan)
Defender covers the right flat (cyan)
Two interior hook droppers (yellow)
Defensive backs fire off both edges (red)
Interior rush arrows attacking the line (red)

reads: IF the offense cannot pick up the DB pressure, THEN a defender comes free off the edge.
IF the quarterback throws hot, THEN the flat and hook droppers sit on the underneath windows.
IF the offense goes deep, THEN the two-deep shell keeps the top capped.
usage_notes: Beats: protections that ignore edge defenders. Coach's Key: DB edge pressure with a two-deep, five-under zone behind it.

name: shinobi_man_up_3_deep

routes.note: Three blue ovals across the top with blue drop lines, splitting the field into thirds
Underneath defenders matched to receivers below the deep shell
Three white boxes with red arrows angling forward, rushing the passer

reads: IF receivers run vertical, THEN the three deep defenders carry them in their third.
IF a route breaks underneath, THEN the man defender stays in trail.
IF the QB holds the ball, THEN the three-man rush works to close the pocket.
usage_notes: Beats: short and intermediate man routes underneath a three-deep umbrella. Coach's Key: three-deep zone over the top with man coverage underneath.

name: shinobi_cover_3_spy

routes.note: Three blue ovals up top with blue drop lines covering the deep thirds
Purple ovals to each side with purple drop lines into the underneath curl-flat
Brown oval over the middle, mirrors the quarterback; olive hook drops nearby
White boxes with red arrows rushing forward

reads: IF a receiver goes vertical, THEN the deep-third defender carries him.
IF the QB scrambles, THEN the spy mirrors and contains.
IF a route hits the curl-flat, THEN the underneath defenders settle on it.
usage_notes: Beats: vertical shots with QB-run insurance. Coach's Key: three-deep zone with a spy on the quarterback.

name: shinobi_under_smoke_quarter_blitz

routes.note: Red arrow angles down toward the gap from the left X defender, comes off the edge.
White square fires straight downhill, A/B gap pressure.
Center defender drops from the circle down to the square, then splits into two red arrows, a twist/stunt working both sides of center.
White square fires down-right into the gap.
A square and an X cross paths, two red arrows crossing, a tackle/end twist on the right side.
X on the first-down line, no rush arrow, drops in coverage.
X on the first-down line, no rush arrow, drops in coverage.
X on the mid line out left, no arrow, sits in coverage.
X on the mid line out right, no arrow, sits in coverage.
Lone X to the right at the 30 with no arrow, plays the underneath hole.

reads: IF you get the blitz home off the crossing stunt, THEN the quarterback is on the ground before the deep men are tested.
IF they slide protection to one twist, THEN the opposite edge rusher should win clean.
IF the ball comes out hot, THEN the underneath X defender squeezes the quick throw.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing dropback and empty looks that cannot handle a 5-plus man blitz. Coach's Key: heavy pressure up front with twists and a crossing stunt, the back-row X marks bail into coverage with no man left over.

name: shinobi_overload_3

routes.note: Three blue ovals across the top with blue drop lines into the deep thirds
Purple ovals each side with purple drop lines underneath
Olive-green oval centered with a green line, dropping to the middle hook
Multiple white boxes with red arrows, an extra rusher overloads the rush

reads: IF the protection slides away, THEN the overload rusher comes free.
IF the QB beats the pressure, THEN the three-deep zone caps the verticals.
IF a hot route breaks, THEN the underneath curl-flat and hook defenders squeeze it.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing protections by overloading one side. Coach's Key: pressure behind a three-deep zone shell.

name: shinobi_cross_3_fire-2

routes.note: purple deep zone
purple deep zone
purple deep zone
green underneath zone
red arrows crossing each other through the middle gaps
purple underneath drops to the sides

reads: IF the line zone-blocks, THEN the crossing blitzers cross-face to free a rusher.
IF the QB gets the ball out hot, THEN the underneath zones rally.
IF a vertical releases, THEN the three deep thirds stay capped.
usage_notes: Beats: interior protection with a crossing stunt. Coach's Key: the cross-fire scrambles the blocking assignments.

name: shinobi_cover_1_hole-9

routes.note: blue deep zone over the top
green zone sitting in the middle hole
four red rush arrows

reads: IF a crosser or drag enters the middle, THEN the hole defender carries it.
IF a receiver wins outside deep, THEN the single-high safety helps.
IF the QB holds the ball, THEN the rush gets home.
usage_notes: Beats: shallow crossers and dump-offs over the middle. Coach's Key: man-free with a hole plug underneath.

name: shinobi_ss_2_trap

routes.note: blue deep zone
blue deep zone
cyan flat zone trapping the outside route
yellow underneath trap to the outside
yellow underneath zones reading the routes
five red rush arrows

reads: IF a quick out or hitch shows, THEN the trap defender jumps it for a pick.
IF the throw goes over the trap, THEN the deep half safety covers up top.
IF nothing breaks outside, THEN the underneath defenders wall the middle.
usage_notes: Beats: quick outs and hitches into a Cover 2 trap. Coach's Key: bait the easy throw, trap it with the corner.

name: shinobi_storm_brave_1

routes.note: blue deep zone over the top
four red rush arrows attacking the line

reads: IF the protection cannot account for every rusher, THEN a blitzer comes free.
IF a receiver wins deep, THEN the single-high safety is the only help.
IF the QB beats the rush, THEN man defenders must stay glued.
usage_notes: Beats: protections that lose a free rusher. Coach's Key: bring the storm pressure with one deep safety behind it.

name: shinobi_pinch_buck_0

routes.note: six red arrows, gaps pinched inside and edges added, no deep zones drawn

reads: IF the offense max-protects, THEN you still outnumber the blockers with the all-out pressure.
IF a receiver runs free, THEN there is no safety help, the man defenders are alone.
IF the QB hesitates, THEN the pinched rush gets home fast.
usage_notes: Beats: empty pockets and slow throws. Coach's Key: Cover 0 all-out, win before the ball comes out. High risk, no deep help.

name: shinobi_3_deep_blitz

routes.note: Blue zone bubble with a coverage line angling toward the middle
Blue zone bubble over the middle third
Blue zone bubble over the right third
Olive zone bubble over the middle of the field with a short drop line
Cyan zone bubble on the left side underneath
Cyan zone bubble on the right side underneath
Five white boxes at the box level with red arrows angling upfield, an overload rush bringing extra pressure

reads: Pre-snap: this is three-deep behind a heavy blitz. Identify which gaps the red arrows are attacking.
If the protection holds, the five-man pressure should still get a free rusher through.
If the quarterback gets the ball out hot, the olive hook and two cyan flat zones squeeze the short windows.
If they take a deep shot, the three deep defenders stay on top and make him beat the rush first.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing dropbacks and empty protections. Coach's Key: five-man blitz under a three-deep, three-under zone shell. Bring heat but keep a roof over the top.

name: shinobi_cover_4_drop-4

routes.note: Two short red arrows show the down line attacking the line
Two pale middle zones drop and match the intermediate, white lines show them dropping
Four purple/blue zones split the deep field into quarters across the width of the field

reads: Pre-snap: four deep zones stretched across the field is the quarters tell. This is Cover 4.
If the offense takes a deep shot, the four quarter defenders match the verticals across the field.
If they throw underneath, the two drop defenders squeeze the curls and let it complete short.
Rally and tackle: quarters gives up the underneath catch, so close fast and keep it a short gain.
usage_notes: Beats: deep shots and four-vertical concepts. Coach's Key: four-deep quarters with two underneath droppers, take away the big play and tackle the check-down.

name: shinobi_mike_sim_2

routes.note: Several red arrows fire from the front, showing a sim-pressure look attacking the gaps
White line shows a front defender bailing out into coverage as part of the sim
Pale and green middle zones drop over the ball
Two blue zones split the deep field in halves behind the pressure

reads: Pre-snap: red rushers with a white drop line is a simulated pressure. You are sending pressure but dropping a front man, so the rush count stays even.
If the protection slides the wrong way, the sim pressure creates a free rusher.
If the QB throws hot, the dropping defender and the underneath zones wall off the quick game.
Two-deep behind it: the blue safeties cap the deep halves, so this is pressure without giving up the top.
usage_notes: Beats: aggressive protections that overset to the rush. Coach's Key: simulated Mike pressure that drops a front man into a two-deep shell, confuses the protection without losing coverage. Art is busy so confidence is medium.

name: shinobi_hot_blitz_3-5

routes.note: Five red arrows fan out from the line, every front defender firing into a gap
Two green middle zones drop over the short middle
Three blue zones split the deep field into thirds behind the blitz

reads: Pre-snap: five red rushers with three deep zones means a five-man pressure into a three-deep, three-under shell.
If the protection is outnumbered, the extra rusher gets home for the sack.
If the QB throws hot, the two green underneath defenders sit on the quick middle windows.
Deep is capped three-deep, so the pressure forces the ball out fast and short.
usage_notes: Beats: empty and quick-game looks that leave the protection light. Coach's Key: five-man hot pressure with a three-deep, two-under coverage behind it.

name: shinobi_edge_blitz_2

routes.note: Red arrows fire from the front and flare to the edges, attacking off the outside
Two teal zones drop to the flats on each side
Pale/yellow middle zones drop over the ball, yellow lines show them settling
Two blue zones split the deep field in halves behind the pressure

reads: Pre-snap: edge pressure (red flaring outside) with two deep blue zones means a blitz into a two-deep shell.
If the offense holds the ball, the edge rush bends the pocket from the outside.
If the QB throws hot, the teal flat defenders squeeze the quick out and the underneath zones wall the middle.
Two-deep behind it: keep the top capped, so the pressure forces a quick, contested throw.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing dropbacks and tight protections. Coach's Key: edge pressure into a two-deep, five-under zone, get home off the edge without losing the top. Art is busy so confidence is medium.

name: shinobi_cover_1_ss_blitz-2

routes.note: Three down linemen send red arrows straight ahead
White dot fires a red arrow inside
Strong safety drops down and fires a long red arrow off the edge
Blue line drops to the deep middle (single high)

reads: IF the protection slides away from the safety, THEN the strong safety comes free off the edge.
IF the QB throws hot, THEN it is man coverage underneath, win the rep.
IF the play breaks contain, THEN the single-high safety is the last line.
usage_notes: Beats: protections that ignore the safety. Coach's Key: bring the strong safety off the edge with one deep man behind it.

name: shinobi_over_3_sting

routes.note: Cluster of red arrows pressures both gaps and the edge
Blue lines bail to three deep zones
Purple and yellow lines drop into the underneath purple and tan zones

reads: IF the line cannot account for the stung gap, THEN the pressure gets home.
IF the ball comes out quick, THEN the three deep zones stay on top.
IF a hook route sits, THEN the underneath defenders wall it.
usage_notes: Beats: interior protection that misses the stinging rusher. Coach's Key: a gap pressure with three deep zones behind it.

name: shinobi_cover_6_willie-7

routes.note: Three down linemen send red arrows straight ahead
Blue lines play quarters to one side and half to the other
Yellow line drops into the tan middle hook zone
Purple line drops to the curl-flat window

reads: IF the quarters side runs vertical, THEN that defender carries it deep.
IF the route attacks the half-field flat, THEN the underneath defender drives.
IF a crosser shows, THEN the middle hook defender walls it.
usage_notes: Beats: tilted formations. Coach's Key: split-field Cover 6 with the Willie adjustment to the weak hook.

name: shinobi_cb_bench_blitz

routes.note: Red arrow attacks the gap
Red arrow up the middle
Red arrow attacks the gap
White dot fires a red arrow inside
Second white dot fires a red arrow inside
Corner comes from the boundary on a long red arrow off the edge

reads: IF the offense leaves the boundary receiver uncovered, THEN that area is vacated, get home fast.
IF the QB throws hot to the bench, THEN that is the soft spot, the pressure has to win first.
IF the back chips, THEN one of the inside blitzers should still come clean.
usage_notes: Beats: slow boundary-side protections. Coach's Key: bring the corner off the bench, this is an all-out edge pressure.

name: shinobi_cover_4_palms-5

IF both receivers go vertical, THEN play it as straight quarters over the top.
IF the throw is underneath, THEN the hook and flat defenders rally.
usage_notes: Beats: smash and out-breaking combos. Coach's Key: Cover 4 with a palms read, the corner can jump the out.

name: shinobi_cover_3_match-8

IF the route is underneath, THEN pass it to the matched underneath defender.
IF the offense floods one third, THEN the match rules sort the routes.
usage_notes: Beats: vertical and flood concepts. Coach's Key: Cover 3 with match rules, it plays like man on verticals and zone underneath.

name: shinobi_gaps_all_blitz

If the offense shows pass, the front seven all attack the backfield, so get home before the throw.

IF a receiver or back releases, THEN the nearest man defender travels with him, no zone help.
IF the QB holds it, THEN the rush has to win because man coverage leaves no free safety.
usage_notes: Beats: goal line runs and quick man-beatable throws. Coach's Key: pressure plus man across the board, win up front and trust your man defenders behind.

IF a vertical threatens, THEN the two deep halves cap it.
IF the quick game shows, THEN the flats and hooks squeeze.
usage_notes: Art label: BLITZ. Beats: protections fooled by the simulated nickel pressure. Coach's Key: simulate the blitz, drop into two-deep, stay sound underneath.

name: shinobi_cover_2_man-11

routes.note: Blue deep half
Blue deep half
Man coverage underneath both safeties
Four red rush arrows from the line

reads: IF it is a vertical, THEN man coverage trails and the two safeties cap the halves.
IF the back releases, THEN a man defender carries him out.
IF a deep ball threatens the seam, THEN the half safety helps over the top.
usage_notes: Art label: MAN. Beats: short and intermediate man-beaters that stay in front of the safeties. Coach's Key: two deep, man under, four rush.

name: shinobi_double_bracket-4

routes.note: Four red rush arrows from the line
Man alignment with bracket help on two receivers, no routes drawn

reads: IF the bracketed receivers release, THEN inside and outside defenders sandwich them.
IF a route breaks in, THEN the inside bracket player takes it.
IF a route breaks out, THEN the outside bracket player takes it.
usage_notes: Art label: MAN. Beats: offenses with two go-to targets. Coach's Key: double-bracket the studs, rush four, take away the first reads.

name: shinobi_cover_1_contain-3

routes.note: Blue deep zone over the top
Brown short zone over the middle linebacker
Man coverage underneath
Four red rush arrows from the line

reads: IF the quarterback scrambles, THEN the spy contains and keeps him in the pocket.
IF it is a vertical, THEN man coverage trails under the single high safety.
IF a back leaks to the middle, THEN the contain defender can pick him up.
usage_notes: Art label: MAN. Beats: scrambling quarterbacks and draw concepts. Coach's Key: single high, man under, spy the contain, four rush.

name: shinobi_cover_3_sky-12

routes.note: Four red arrows attacking the LOS
Grey zone with white line to the short middle hook
Grey zone with white line to the short middle hook
Purple zone to the left, curl-flat area
Purple zone to the right, curl-flat area
Blue zones across the top, a three-deep shell

reads: IF the strong safety rolls down, THEN he takes the flat and the corner stays deep, this is the Sky rotation.
IF a vertical pushes the deep third, THEN the matching deep defender carries it, do not let anyone behind you.
IF the ball comes out underneath, THEN the curl-flat and hook defenders break and tackle short.
usage_notes: Beats: vertical shots and four verticals. Coach's Key: three deep with a safety rolled down to the flat, so the windows are the curl-to-flat seam and the deep hole between the third defenders.

name: shinobi_mid_blitz

routes.note: Red arrow attacking down through the middle
Red arrow attacking down through the middle
Red arrow attacking down through the middle
Red arrow attacking down through the middle
Red arrow attacking down through the middle
Red arrow attacking down through the middle, a heavy interior mug pressure
White x marks behind the rush, defenders locked on with no zones drawn

reads: IF you are the free rusher, THEN get downhill now, this brings more than they can block up the middle.
IF the back stays in to protect, THEN one rusher comes clean, win your one-on-one.
IF the quarterback escapes the pocket, THEN the man defenders plaster, there is no deep help.
usage_notes: Beats: empty and quick-decision quarterbacks who hold the ball. Coach's Key: all-out interior pressure with man behind it and no deep safety, so it is boom or bust, get home or get burned over the top.

name: shinobi_cover_4_drop-5

routes.note: Four blue lines up to four deep zones across the field. Quarters shell.
Purple line dropping out and down to the left underneath zone.
Purple line dropping out and down to the right underneath zone.
Yellow line from the LOS dropping back into the left tan hook zone (the dropped front player).
Yellow line from the LOS dropping back into the right tan hook zone.
Red arrows from the remaining down linemen rushing the QB (three-man pressure with the two drops).

reads: IF the offense shows a four vertical look, THEN the four deep defenders match each vertical with quarters rules.
IF you are a dropping lineman, THEN gain depth into the hook window and wall off crossers underneath the deep four.
IF the QB looks to dump underneath, THEN the curl/flat droppers squeeze the throwing lane while the rush closes.
usage_notes: Beats: deep shot plays by keeping four over the top, while the dropped linemen rob the intermediate middle. Coach's Key: ZONE drop coverage, you trade rushers for extra underneath bodies, so get pressure with the reduced front.

name: shinobi_cover_3_cloud-7

routes.note: Three blue lines up to three deep zones across the top. Cover 3 shell.
Blue and purple lines dropping out and down to the left underneath zone.
Yellow line from the LOS dropping into the left tan hook zone.
Yellow line from the LOS dropping into the right tan hook zone.
Cyan zone sitting low and outside on the right. Cloud corner squats the flat.
Red arrows from the down linemen at the LOS rushing the QB.

reads: IF the offense runs verticals, THEN the three deep defenders split the field into thirds and stay on top.
IF a receiver releases to the cloud flat, THEN the squat corner jumps it and the deep third rotates over the top behind him.
IF routes cross the hook windows, THEN the two interior droppers wall them and pass them off in zone.
IF nothing comes underneath, THEN the curl/flat droppers expand to take away the sideline throws.
usage_notes: Beats: flat and sideline throws on the cloud side by sitting a corner low while keeping three deep. Coach's Key: ZONE, cloud means the corner squats the flat instead of bailing, so the deep third behind him is covered by the rotating safety.

name: shinobi_overload_3_seam_show_2

routes.note: Three blue deep zones
Purple zones on the edges
Olive zone walling the seam
Red arrows converging to one side, overloading the protection

reads: IF the offense cannot block the overloaded side THEN a free runner gets home.
IF a seam route shows THEN the seam defender walls it off.
IF the QB throws hot THEN the three-deep shell keeps it in front.
usage_notes: Beats: a protection that cannot slide to the overload. Coach's Key: overload one side behind a three-deep shell.

name: shinobi_tampa_2-18

routes.note: Two blue deep zones
Olive zone running to the deep middle
Teal zones outside
Gray zones underneath
Four red rush arrows

reads: IF a seam splits the safeties THEN the Tampa runner carries it up the deep middle.
IF a vertical shows outside THEN the deep-half safety caps it.
IF the ball goes to the flat THEN the flat defender drives on it.
usage_notes: Beats: the seam and deep dig that hurt regular Cover 2. Coach's Key: the middle defender sprints to the deep hole.

name: shinobi_cover_3_buzz_mable-6

routes.note: Three blue deep zones playing match
Olive hook zones with a defender buzzing down
Purple zones on the edges
Four red rush arrows

reads: IF a seam shows THEN the buzz defender walls it in the hook.
IF two go vertical THEN the match rules carry them like man.
IF a short route releases THEN reroute and pass it off.
usage_notes: Beats: seam and dig concepts. Coach's Key: Mable buzzes a defender down to wall the inside vertical.

name: shinobi_double_bracket_switch-3

routes.note: White X marks on receivers
Two white dots set to double a target with a switch rule
Four red rush arrows

reads: IF the bracketed receiver crosses THEN switch the bracket defenders off and on.
IF a single-covered man wins THEN trust the four-man rush.
IF the offense motions THEN re-set the bracket and keep the switch rule.
usage_notes: Beats: an offense that crosses its star to shake coverage. Coach's Key: the switch keeps the double team intact through crossers.

name: shinobi_cover_4_palms-6

routes.note: Four blue deep zones playing palms match
Purple zones on the edges
Olive hook zone in the middle
Four red rush arrows

reads: IF number two goes vertical THEN the safety takes him in quarters.
IF number two breaks out THEN the corner jumps it and the safety takes number one.
IF both stay short THEN sink and rob the next threat.
usage_notes: Beats: smash and out concepts that attack quarters. Coach's Key: palms reads number two to trigger the corner trap.

name: shinobi_cover_6-5

routes.note: Blue deep zones, two quarters and a half
Purple zone on the left
Olive zones in the middle
Teal zone on the right
Four red rush arrows

reads: IF the quarters side goes vertical THEN match it like man.
IF the half side runs a corner THEN the deep-half defender caps it.
IF the ball goes underneath THEN the flat or curl defender drives on it.
usage_notes: Beats: flood and smash split across the field. Coach's Key: quarters to one side, half to the other.

name: shinobi_1_double_slot-2

routes.note: White X marks on receivers
Two white dots set to double the slot receiver
Four red rush arrows

reads: IF the slot receiver releases THEN bracket him high and low.
IF a single-covered route wins THEN the four-man rush has to close.
IF the offense motions the slot THEN carry the double across.
usage_notes: Beats: an offense that lives off the slot. Coach's Key: take away the slot, dare the outside to win.

name: shinobi_show_ss_sim_2-2

routes.note: Two blue deep zones
Olive zone over the middle
Teal zones outside
Gray zones underneath, white droppers
Red arrows from the strong-safety edge plus interior

reads: IF the protection ignores the strong safety THEN he comes free off the edge.
IF a dropper bails THEN he fills the vacated hook or flat.
IF the QB throws hot THEN the two-deep shell keeps it bracketed.
usage_notes: Beats: a strong-side dropback that does not count the safety. Coach's Key: show the strong-safety blitz, rush five behind two deep.

name: shinobi_nickel_2_trap-4

routes.note: Two blue deep zones
Teal zones sitting to trap the flat throw
Red rush arrows from the edges and interior

reads: IF the QB throws a quick out or flat THEN the trap defender jumps the throw.
IF the protection cannot handle the rush THEN a free runner gets home.
IF a vertical shows THEN the deep-half safety caps it over the top.
usage_notes: Beats: quick flat and bubble throws. Coach's Key: trap the flat and bring pressure behind two deep.

name: shinobi_cover_4_quarters-12

routes.note: Four blue deep zones splitting the field
Purple zones on the edges
Olive hook zone in the middle
Four red rush arrows

reads: IF a receiver runs vertical THEN the quarter defender takes him man deep.
IF the route stays short THEN sink off and rob the next threat.
IF the offense floods a side THEN pass the routes off in quarters.
usage_notes: Beats: deep shots and four verticals. Coach's Key: quarters caps the deep ball, concede the underneath catch.

name: shinobi_bracket_switch_willie-4

routes.note: Single blue deep zone with a safety dropping into it on the right
White X marks on receivers
Two white dots set to double a target with a switch rule
Four red rush arrows

reads: IF the bracketed receiver crosses THEN switch the double off and on.
IF a single-covered man wins THEN the four-man rush has to close.
IF a deep ball goes up THEN the single-high safety helps over the top.
usage_notes: Beats: a star receiver who crosses the formation. Coach's Key: single-high with a switching bracket on the favorite target.

name: shinobi_fs_will_blitz_0-3

routes.note: Multiple red arrows converging from edges and interior
Red rush arrows off the line
White X marks on receivers, no deep help

reads: IF the offense cannot block the free safety and Will THEN a runner comes free.
IF a hot route shows THEN the QB has to throw it now, there is no deep safety.
IF the ball comes out late THEN the overload pressure should arrive first.
usage_notes: Beats: a slow dropback in an empty or light protection. Coach's Key: zero coverage, bring the free safety and Will, win up front.

name: shinobi_cover_3_cloud-8

Purple zone, the corner sinking to the flat on the left
Olive zones over the middle
Teal zone on the right
Four red rush arrows

IF a vertical pushes deep THEN the safety rotates over the third.
IF an underneath route releases THEN the hook/curl defender drives on it.

name: shinobi_lb_de_twist_3

Yellow line drops to the middle hook landmark (center olive bubble)
Purple/magenta lines drop to the outside underneath zones (the purple bubbles)
Blue lines bail to three deep landmarks across the top

IF the QB climbs the pocket, THEN the looping rusher meets him
IF the ball comes out, THEN settle into the three-deep, three-under zones behind the stunt
usage_notes: Beats: man protections that do not pass off the twist. Coach's Key: LB/DE twist up front to win one-on-ones, dropping into a Cover 3 shell behind it.

name: shinobi_cover_1_lb_blitz-7

IF the back stays in, THEN the extra linebacker rusher comes free
IF the QB takes a shot deep, THEN the single-high safety is there to rob the post
usage_notes: Beats: max protect and slow routes. Coach's Key: Cover 1 man-free with a linebacker blitz, one deep safety, everybody else locks man and the LB pressure forces it out early.

name: shinobi_cover_3_sky-13

Two yellow lines drop to the middle hook landmarks (the two tan bubbles)
Purple/magenta line drops to the underneath flat, the safety/nickel rolls down to the flat (sky) rather than the corner
Blue lines bail to three deep-third landmarks across the top

reads: IF the receiver runs deep, THEN pass him to the deep-third defender
IF the QB throws the flat, THEN the rolled-down sky defender drives on it
IF the seam shows, THEN the hook dropper carries it to the deep middle
usage_notes: Beats: flat and curl concepts to the strong side. Coach's Key: Cover 3 sky, the strong safety/nickel rolls to the flat while corners play the deep thirds.

name: shinobi_cover_6_willie-8

Purple/magenta line drops to the short flat on the Cover 2 (cloud) side (the purple bubble)
Yellow/green line drops to the middle hook landmark (the olive bubble)
Blue lines split the back end into a quarters look to one side and a half/cloud look to the other, the Cover 6 combination

reads: IF the receiver attacks the quarters side, THEN match him vertically in your quarter
IF the ball goes to the cloud-side flat, THEN the squat defender jumps it
IF it crosses the field, THEN the hook dropper carries the crosser
usage_notes: Beats: field/boundary combos by playing two coverages. Coach's Key: Cover 6 (Willie strength call), quarters to one side and Cover 2 to the other, set the cloud away from their best route.

name: shinobi_lb_blitz_0-2

routes.note: Five red arrows fire from the mug, the linebackers (one shown looping in from depth) all rush with no deep help drawn
Remaining defenders shown only as pre-snap alignment marks with no zone drops, everyone left is man with no safety over the top

IF the back releases, THEN an unblocked linebacker is already home
IF the QB hesitates, THEN the all-out LB pressure gets there
usage_notes: Beats: max-protect dropbacks that leave the box outnumbered. Coach's Key: Cover 0 linebacker blitz, no deep safety, the rush has to win now or it is a big play.

routes.note: purple oval to the boundary, beige ovals with yellow drop lines
cluster of red arrows at the LOS

IF it attacks the half side, THEN the cloud corner sits the flat under the deep half.
IF nothing opens, THEN the front rush closes.
usage_notes: Beats: high-low concepts to one side. Coach's Key: Cover 6, quarters to the field and cover 2 to the boundary.

name: shinobi_lb_de_twist_3-2

routes.route: three deep blue zones across the top
routes.note: blue ovals spanning deep

routes.route: two purple underneath zones outside plus a yellow middle drop

routes.route: rush with a crossing twist stunt up front (red angled arrows crossing)
routes.note: red arrows that cross at the LOS showing the twist

IF a hot route shows, THEN the underneath dropper squeezes it.
IF protection holds, THEN the twist still frees a rusher.
usage_notes: Beats: man protections that get crossed up by the stunt. Coach's Key: three-deep fire zone with an LB/DE twist to free pressure.

name: shinobi_cover_6_willie-9

routes.note: blue ovals deep across the top

routes.route: purple cloud/flat zone to the boundary plus a beige hook with a yellow drop
routes.note: purple oval to one side, beige oval center with yellow line
cluster of red arrows at the LOS

reads: IF the offense floods the half side, THEN the cloud corner squats under the deep half.
IF verticals hit the quarters side, THEN the safety and corner bracket them.
IF nothing comes open, THEN the front rush finishes.
usage_notes: Beats: high-low and flat concepts to the cloud side. Coach's Key: Cover 6 with a Willie cloud corner squatting the flat.

name: shinobi_cover_2_man-12

routes.route: two deep blue zones split the field (2-deep safeties)
routes.note: two large blue ovals high, blue lines back to two deep defenders

routes.route: rush/man underneath shown by red arrows from four box defenders
routes.note: four red arrows from the LOS, white X's in man with no underneath ovals

reads: IF two safeties stay deep, THEN play man underneath with help over the top.
IF a vertical pushes a seam, THEN funnel it to the deep-half safety.
IF the back releases, THEN a man defender carries him while the rush closes.
usage_notes: Beats: isolation routes underneath. Coach's Key: 2-Man, trail underneath and lean on the two-deep safeties for help.

name: shinobi_cover_3_match-10

routes.route: three deep blue zones across the top (Cover 3 match shell)
routes.note: blue ovals spanning deep

routes.route: two purple underneath zones outside plus two beige hook drops inside
routes.note: purple ovals both sides, beige ovals center with yellow lines

routes.route: rush (short red arrows from the box)
routes.note: small cluster of red arrows at the LOS

reads: IF receivers release vertical, THEN the deep-third defenders match and carry them.
IF an underneath route shows, THEN the curl/hook dropper passes and squeezes by pattern.
IF nothing opens, THEN the front rush closes.
usage_notes: Beats: vertical and four-verts looks via pattern match. Coach's Key: Cover 3 match, carry routes rather than spot-drop.

name: shinobi_blitz_loop_3

routes.note: Red arrows loop and cross across the front, the DT works around to a new gap
Red arrow fires forward off the front
Purple short zones underneath, one yellow hook drop in the middle
Blue bubbles spread across the top: three-deep shell

reads: IF the protection slides to the loop, THEN the trailing rusher should come free.
IF the quick game shows, THEN the underneath purple zones cap the curl and flat.
IF the ball goes deep, THEN three defenders split the deep thirds.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing dropbacks against a looping rush. Coach's Key: front loops to win a one-gap edge, three-deep zone sits behind the pressure.

name: shinobi_cover_3_match-11

routes.note: Three blue zones split the deep field into thirds and pattern-match the verticals
Purple zones sink to the curl and carry to the flat on each side
Yellow lines: the two mug defenders drop out into the tan middle hook zones instead of rushing
Four red arrows, the four down linemen bring the only rush

reads: If a receiver runs vertical, then the matching deep-third defender carries it man-style.
If two receivers flood one third, then the underneath curl/flat defender takes the short one and the deep third stays on top.
If a route crosses the middle, then the mug hooks in the tan zones pass it off and wall it.
usage_notes: Beats: four-verticals and flood concepts. Coach's Key: Cover 3 with pattern-match rules (carry, do not spot-drop), front four rush and both mugs drop.

name: shinobi_side_blitz

routes.note: Six red arrows, every box defender fires straight ahead in an all-out side pressure

reads: IF the offense cannot account for all six rushers, THEN one comes free.
IF the QB has to throw hot, THEN the overloaded rush is the reason.
IF the protection holds up, THEN the QB still has no time with everyone coming.
usage_notes: Beats: protections that cannot block up a full-house pressure. Coach's Key: all-out box blitz with no coverage drops drawn, get the ball out or get hit.

name: shinobi_fs_will_blitz_0-4

routes.note: Outside defenders with red arrows rushing off the edges.
Four interior defenders with red arrows converging on the QB.
One off-ball defender (white dot) holding in the middle; one deep defender remains.
No deep zones drawn; Cover 0 pressure with the FS and Will added.

reads: If the FS and Will come, there is essentially no deep help, so it must get home.
If they have a quick answer, the rush has to win immediately.
If the QB breaks the pocket, the lone middle defender contains.
usage_notes: Beats: long-developing dropbacks. Coach's Key: bring the free safety and Will on a Cover 0 pressure.

name: shinobi_double_bracket_man_coverage-2

routes.note: Red down-arrow off the line of scrimmage
Red down-arrow off the line of scrimmage
Red down-arrow off the line of scrimmage
Red down-arrow off the line of scrimmage
Two dots set just behind the line over the middle
Spread to the numbers and deep, no drawn drop lines

reads: IF the offense isolates a primary target, THEN bracket him over and under with the nearest two defenders.
IF the front of four presses, THEN play tight man behind with the middle dots reading inside breakers.
IF a vertical develops, THEN carry it into the deep coverage and keep the bracket intact.
usage_notes: Beats: offenses that lean on one matchup. Coach's Key: four-man press up front, man behind, two middle defenders ready to double the key receiver.

name: shinobi_cover_4_drop_field-4

routes.note: Four blue deep zones with blue drop lines.
Magenta match zones to each side with magenta lines.
Gray hook zones in the middle with white drop lines; a defender dropping to the field.
Four down defenders with red arrows rushing.

reads: If they go vertical, each quarter defender carries his deep man.
If they flood the field underneath, the dropping defender fills it.
If they check down, the hook defenders are waiting.
usage_notes: Beats: field-side floods and verticals. Coach's Key: quarters with an extra underneath dropper to the field.

name: shinobi_buck_slant_3

routes.note: Three blue deep zones across the top.
Magenta match zones to each side with magenta lines.
Olive hook zone in the middle with a yellow line.
Red slanting rush lines, the front slanting and crossing as it rushes.

reads: If the line slants, the gaps shift and a rusher should come clean.
If they throw hot, the Cover 3 zone is set behind the slant.
If they run it, the slanting front is built to spill the ball.
usage_notes: Beats: gap runs and quick game. Coach's Key: slant the front into the pressure, play Cover 3 behind.

name: shinobi_show_ss_sim_2-3

routes.note: Two blue deep zones with blue drop lines.
Olive deep-middle zone with a green line carrying the middle.
Gray hook zones with white drop lines.
Teal flat zones on each side with cyan lines.
Red stunting rush lines; the strong safety shows pressure then bails.

reads: If the strong safety shows blitz, the QB may bail his protection early.
If they throw hot, the two-deep zone is already behind the sim.
If the protection misses the twist, a rusher comes free inside.
usage_notes: Beats: protections that react to the SS show. Coach's Key: bluff strong-safety pressure, drop into a 2-shell sim.

name: shinobi_cover_1_hole-11

routes.note: Single blue deep zone with a blue drop line, single high.
Olive underneath zone with a green line, sitting in the middle hole.
Four down defenders with red arrows rushing.
MAN label; man across with a hole defender underneath.

reads: If they cross the middle, the hole defender robs the throw.
If they go deep, the single-high free safety has the top.
If everyone is in man, the hole player reads the QB's eyes.
usage_notes: Beats: shallow crossers and digs. Coach's Key: single-high man with a defender sitting in the hole.

name: shinobi_double_bracket_switch-4

routes.note: Four white boxes on the line, each with a red downhill arrow rushing straight ahead.
Two white dots behind the front, no rush arrow drawn.
X marks spread across the field in man, label reads MAN.

reads: Pre-snap: count the four red arrows, this is a four-man rush from the Nickel 2-4 front.
The label reads MAN, so the back-end defenders match up with their receivers.
If receivers cross, the man defenders switch or stay based on the bracket rule and pass the crossers off.
If nothing comes open, the four-man rush has to finish at the QB.
usage_notes: Beats: crossing and switch route concepts. Coach's Key: four rush, man behind it with bracket switch rules on crossers.

name: shinobi_cover_3_sky-14

routes.note: Three blue deep zones with blue drop lines.
Magenta curl-flat zones on each side with magenta lines, the safety rotating to the flat.
Olive hook zones across the middle with yellow lines.
Four down defenders with red arrows rushing.

reads: If the strong safety rolls to the flat, that area is covered (sky).
If they go vertical, the three deep defenders cap it.
If they sit in the curl, the underneath defenders settle.
usage_notes: Beats: flat and curl combos. Coach's Key: Cover 3 with the safety rotating down to the flat.

name: shinobi_silver_shoot_pinch-2

routes.note: Outside defender (X mark) shooting down with a red arrow.
Four down defenders with red arrows pinching inside.
Off-ball defenders (white dots) holding behind the pressure.

reads: If the edge shoots and the line pinches, the gaps collapse inside.
If they bounce it outside, the shooter has to set the edge.
If they throw quick, the pinch has to win fast since deep help is thin.
usage_notes: Beats: interior runs and slow drops. Coach's Key: pinch the line inside and shoot an edge off the perimeter.

name: shinobi_cover_3_match-12

routes.note: Three blue deep zones with blue drop lines.
Magenta match zones on each side with magenta lines.
Olive match zones across the middle with yellow lines.
Four down defenders with red arrows rushing.

reads: If a receiver runs vertical, the match defender carries him into the third.
If they run curls, the underneath defenders pattern-match them.
If the rush is slow, the matched three-deep keeps a lid on top.
usage_notes: Beats: vertical and curl combos. Coach's Key: Cover 3 with pattern-match rules across the field.

name: shinobi_edge_blitz_3-4

routes.note: Three blue deep zones across the top.
Magenta curl zones on each side with magenta lines.
Olive hook zone in the middle with a yellow line.
Red crossing/looping rush lines forming an X stunt at the edge.

reads: If the edge stunt frees a rusher, the QB has to move the ball.
If they throw hot, the Cover 3 zone is set behind the pressure.
If they slide protection, the loop should win late.
usage_notes: Beats: slow-developing dropbacks. Coach's Key: edge pressure with a stunt, Cover 3 behind it.

name: shinobi_cover_3_cloud-9

routes.note: Three blue deep zones with blue drop lines.
Teal flat zone to one side with a cyan line, the corner sinking to the flat.
Magenta curl zone to the other side with a magenta line.
Olive hook zones in the middle with yellow lines.
Four down defenders with red arrows rushing.

reads: If the cloud corner sinks to the flat, that side has a hard underneath roof.
If they go vertical, the three deep defenders cap it.
If they hit the curl away from cloud, the curl defender is there.
usage_notes: Beats: flat and smash routes to the cloud side. Coach's Key: Cover 3 with a cloud corner squatting the flat.

name: shinobi_cover_2_invert-3

routes.note: Two blue deep zones with blue drop lines (inverted to the halves).
Olive deep-middle zone with a green line running the seam.
Gray hook zones with white drop lines.
Teal flat zones on each side with cyan lines.
Four down defenders with red arrows rushing.

reads: If the safeties and underneath defenders invert, the coverage looks like 2 but rotates differently.
If they attack the deep middle, the inverting defender carries the seam.
If they hit the flat, the corner is sitting underneath.
usage_notes: Beats: seam and flat combos. Coach's Key: two-deep look with inverted rotation, carry the middle seam.

name: shinobi_cov_3_buzz_match

routes.note: Blue zone, left third
Blue zone, middle third
Blue zone, right third
Green lines buzzing down into the hook zones
Purple zone left
Purple zone right

reads: IF the ball is snapped, THEN a safety buzzes down to the hook while the rotation gives you three deep.
IF a slot runs vertical, THEN the match rules carry him and pass him to the deep third.
IF routes stay underneath, THEN the buzz defender and curl droppers squeeze the middle windows.
IF the four-man rush wins, THEN the coverage only has to hold a beat.

name: shinobi_cover_2_invert-4

White zone over the right middle

Cyan zone outside right

reads: IF the ball is snapped, THEN the safeties play the deep halves and a defender inverts down to cap the middle.
IF a receiver attacks the deep middle, THEN the inverting defender takes the hole between the two halves.
IF routes stay outside, THEN the flat zones and hook droppers wall underneath.
IF the QB holds it, THEN the four-man rush has to close.
usage_notes: Beats: deep seam and dig routes that try to split a normal Cover 2. Coach's Key: badge reads ZONE. The invert puts a defender in the deep hole so the halves stay wide.

name: shinobi_cover_4_quarters-13

Blue zone, left-middle quarter
Blue zone, right-middle quarter
Blue zone, far right quarter

Purple zone right
Green zone underneath the middle
Four red arrows off the line of scrimmage

reads: IF the ball is snapped, THEN four defenders split the deep quarters and match vertical releases.
IF a receiver runs short, THEN the quarter defender drives down on the underneath route by match rule.
IF two receivers go vertical to one side, THEN the safety and corner bracket them in their quarters.
IF nothing goes deep, THEN the underneath droppers and four-man rush handle the short game.
usage_notes: Beats: deep shot plays and four-vertical concepts get capped by four-over-the-top. Coach's Key: badge reads MATCH. Soft over the top, plays the run with safeties driving down.

name: shinobi_db_blitz_tex_3

IF the offense doesn't account for the DB, THEN the corner or nickel comes free off the edge.

IF the protection holds, THEN three deep keeps the top of the coverage capped.
usage_notes: Beats: protections that can't pick up an extra DB rusher plus a stunt. Coach's Key: badge reads BLITZ. Cover 3 shell (three blue deep, purple curl/seam drops) behind the pressure.

name: shinobi_okie_roll_2_blitz

Teal zone on the right with a cyan line, carries the short outside area.

reads: Pre-snap: confirm the heavy front. Multiple white squares at the line means the interior and right edge are coming.
IF the QB tries to step up: the interior rush and the spy over the middle close the pocket, so collapse it fast.
IF the ball goes outside quick: the teal short zones on each side and the underneath gray zone squeeze the flats and hooks.
IF the offense pushes a shot downfield: the two blue deep halves split the field, so keep everything in front and rally up.
usage_notes: Beats: dropback passers who hold the ball, and offenses that leave the right edge light. Coach's Key: this is a two-deep blitz, you send the front and the right edge while two safeties cap the deep halves and the underneath zones rob the quick game.

routes.note: single blue zone up top, lone deep safety (Cover 1)

IF the Mike and SS dog, THEN the middle is vacated by rushers, get the ball out before pressure.
IF coverage is man with no zones, THEN beat your defender quick, there is no underneath help.

name: shinobi_db_sting

reads: IF defensive backs sting off the edges, THEN it is all-out pressure, the ball must come out immediately.
IF no zones or deep help are drawn, THEN coverage is man with everyone left singled up.
IF you have a quick man-beater, THEN throw it hot before the sting gets home.
usage_notes: Beats: a fast hot throw and a quick slant or out beating the all-out pressure. Coach's Key: zero-coverage DB sting, max pressure, get rid of it now.

name: shinobi_overload_blitz-2

routes.note: multiple red arrows stacked and crossing, rushers overload the gaps, no zones drawn

reads: IF the rush overloads the protection, THEN the line is outnumbered, get the ball out fast.
IF no zones are drawn, THEN coverage is man behind it with no help, find your one-on-one.
IF the overload tips one side, THEN attack away from the pressure with a quick throw.
usage_notes: Beats: quick game and a hot throw away from the overloaded side. Coach's Key: gap-overload pressure with man behind it, beat it before the rush arrives.

name: shinobi_cover_1_robber-4

IF a robber lurks underneath, THEN do not throw the dig or crosser into the middle, he is sitting on it.
IF the robber takes the middle, THEN work the outside man-beaters away from him.
usage_notes: Beats: outside man-beaters and verticals away from the robber. Coach's Key: single-high man with a robber lurking the middle, avoid inside-breaking routes.

IF three deep plays behind it, THEN do not force the vertical, attack the underneath voids.
IF the hooks drop, THEN take the curl or flat in front of the deep zones.
usage_notes: Beats: smash and curl-flat combos that stress the rolled-down zones, plus the seam between the deep thirds. Coach's Key: three-deep with a sky (strong safety) rotation to the flat.

IF the safeties stay on the hashes, THEN the seam and the post into the hole are the soft spots.

IF a receiver beats man deep, THEN the single-high safety is the lone help.
IF the QB stalls, THEN the five-man pressure collapses the pocket.
usage_notes: Beats: five-man protections, brings one more than they can block. Coach's Key: man-free saw pressure with a single deep safety.

reads: IF the offense reads a 2-high shell pre-snap, THEN you actually drop to four-deep quarters.
IF two verticals release, THEN each quarter defender matches his man.
IF routes stay underneath, THEN the two yellow hook defenders squeeze them.
usage_notes: Beats: pre-snap 2-high reads, disguises into quarters. Coach's Key: show two, drop to four over the top.

name: shinobi_prevent_3_deep

routes.note: Blue zone bubble high on the left with a coverage line
Blue zone bubble high over the left-center
Blue zone bubble high over the right-center
Blue zone bubble high on the right with a coverage line
Purple zone bubble on the left underneath the deep shell, coverage line working outside
Purple zone bubble on the right underneath the deep shell, coverage line working outside
Olive zone bubble over the middle with a short drop line down to a white reference dot
White box at the line, red arrow driving straight upfield
White box at the line, red arrow driving straight upfield
White box at the line, red arrow driving straight upfield

reads: Pre-snap: this is a deep prevent shell with four defenders capping the deep field. Keep everything in front of you.
If the offense takes a deep shot, the four deep defenders converge and the ball has nowhere to land.
If they dump it short, the two purple intermediate zones and the olive hook rally up and tackle in bounds.
Only three rush, so do not give up the deep ball. Make them grind underneath and run out of clock.
usage_notes: Beats: hail-mary and end-of-half deep shots. Coach's Key: four deep, three under, three-man rush. Trade short yardage for time and keep the ball in front of the defense.
